aheyamanupAdeyaM manovAchAmagocharam . aprameyamanAdyantaM brahma pUrNamahaM mahaH .. 240.. pUrNaM mahanmahaH
yatparaM sakalavAgagocharaM gocharaM vimalabodhachakShuShaH . shud.hdhachid.hghanamanAdi vastu yad.h brahma tattvamasi bhAvayAtmani

siddha.text: sarvavedAntasid.hdhAntagocharaM tamagocharam . govindaM paramAnandaM sad.hguruM praNato.asmyaham
shud.hdhAdvayabrahmavibodhanAshyA sarpabhramo rajjuvivekato yathA . rajastamaHsattvamiti prasid.hdhA guNAstadIyAH prathitaiH svakAryaiH
satyaM j~nAnamanantaM brahma vishud.hdhaM paraM svataHsid.hdham . nityAnandaikarasaM pratyagabhinnaM nirantaraM jayati
tatastu tau lakShaNayA sulakShyau tayorakhaNDaikarasatvasid.hdhaye . nAlaM jahatyA na tathA.ajahatyA kintUbhayArthAtmikayaiva bhAvyam .. 247.. bhayArthaikatayaiva
asthUlamityetadasannirasya sid.hdhaM svato vyomavadapratarkyam . ato mR^iShAmAtramidaM pratItaM jahIhi yatsvAtmatayA gR^ihItam . brahmAhamityeva vishud.hdhabud.hdhyA vid.hdhi svamAtmAnamakhaNDabodham
shrutismR^itinyAyashatairniShid.hdhe dR^ishye.atra yaH svAtmamatiM karoti . upaiti duHkhopari duHkhajAtaM niShid.hdhakartA sa malimlucho yathA
sarvAtmasid.hdhaye bhikShoH kR^itashravaNakarmaNaH . sArvAtmya samAdhiM vidadhAtyeShA shAnto dAnta iti shrutiH
prakR^itivikR^itishUnyaM bhAvanAtItabhAvaM samarasamasamAnaM mAnasambandhadUram . nigamavachanasid.hdhaM nityamasmatprasid.hdhaM hR^idi kalayati vidvAn brahma pUrNaM samAdhau

param.text: sarvavedAntasid.hdhAntagocharaM tamagocharam . govindaM paramAnandaM sad.hguruM praNato.asmyaham

jantUnAM narajanma durlabhamataH pu.nstvaM tato vipratA tasmAdvaidikadharmamArgaparatA vidvattvamasmAtparam . AtmAnAtmavivechanaM svanubhavo brahmAtmanA sa.nsthitiH muktirno shatajanmakoTisukR^itaiH puNyairvinA labhyate
mA bhaiShTa vidva.nstava nAstyapAyaH sa.nsArasindhostaraNe.astyupAyaH . yenaiva yAtA yatayo.asya pAraM tameva mArgaM tava nirdishAmi
astyupAyo mahAnkashchitsa.nsArabhayanAshanaH . tena tIrtvA bhavAmbhodhiM paramAnandamApsyasi
aj~nAnayogAtparamAtmanastava hyanAtmabandhastata eva sa.nsR^itiH . tayorvivekoditabodhavahniH aj~nAnakAryaM pradahetsamUlam
ko nAma bandhaH kathameSha AgataH kathaM pratiShThAsya kathaM vimokShaH . ko.asAvanAtmA paramaH ka AtmA tayorvivekaH kathametaduchyatAm
tataH shrutistanmananaM satattva\- dhyAnaM chiraM nityanirantaraM muneH . tato.avikalpaM parametya vidvAn.h ihaiva nirvANasukhaM samR^ichChati
parasparAMshairmilitAni bhUtvA sthUlAni cha sthUlasharIrahetavaH . mAtrAstadIyA viShayA bhavanti shabdAdayaH pa~ncha sukhAya bhoktuH
ApAtavairAgyavato mumukShUn.h bhavAbdhipAraM pratiyAtumudyatAn . AshAgraho majjayate.antarAle nigR^ihya kaNThe vinivartya vegAt
viShayAkhyagraho yena suviraktyasinA hataH . sa gachChati bhavAmbhodheH pAraM pratyUhavarjitaH

ko nAma bandhaH kathameSha AgataH kathaM pratiShThAsya kathaM vimokShaH . ko.asAvanAtmA paramaH ka AtmA tayorvivekaH kathametaduchyatAm
yad.hbod.hdhavyaM tavedAnImAtmAnAtmavivechanam . taduchyate mayA samyak shrutvAtmanyavadhAraya
dehendriyaprANamano.ahamAdayaH sarve vikArA viShayAH sukhAdayaH . vyomAdibhUtAnyakhilaM cha vishvaM avyaktaparyantamidaM hyanAtmA
mAyA mAyAkAryaM sarvaM mahadAdidehaparyantam . asadidamanAtmatattvaM vid.hdhi tvaM marumarIchikAkalpam
atrAnAtmanyahamiti matirbandha eSho.asya puMsaH prApto.aj~nAnAjjananamaraNakleshasampAtahetuH . yenaivAyaM vapuridamasatsatyamityAtmabud.hdhyA puShyatyukShatyavati viShayaistantubhiH koshakR^idvat
tirobhUte svAtmanyamalataratejovati pumAn.h anAtmAnaM mohAdahamiti sharIraM kalayati . tataH kAmakrodhaprabhR^itibhiramuM bandhanaguNaiH paraM vikShepAkhyA rajasa urushaktirvyathayati
aj~nAnamUlo.ayamanAtmabandho naisargiko.anAdirananta IritaH . janmApyayavyAdhijarAdiduHkha\- pravAhapAtaM janayatyamuShya
AtmAnAtmavivekaH kartavyo bandhamuktaye viduShA . tenaivAnandI bhavati svaM vij~nAya sachchidAnandam

brahma.text: jantUnAM narajanma durlabhamataH pu.nstvaM tato vipratA tasmAdvaidikadharmamArgaparatA vidvattvamasmAtparam . AtmAnAtmavivechanaM svanubhavo brahmAtmanA sa.nsthitiH muktirno shatajanmakoTisukR^itaiH puNyairvinA labhyate
vadantu shAstrANi yajantu devAn.h kurvantu karmANi bhajantu devatAH . Atmaikyabodhena vinApi mukti\- rna sidhyati brahmashatAntare.api
ato vichAraH kartavyo jij~nAsorAtmavastunaH .. samAsAdya dayAsindhuM guruM brahmaviduttamam
vivekino viraktasya shamAdiguNashAlinaH . mumukShoreva hi brahmajij~nAsAyogyatA matA
brahma satyaM jaganmithyetyevaMrUpo vinishchayaH . so.ayaM nityAnityavastuvivekaH samudAhR^itaH
tadvairAgyaM jihAsA yA darshanashravaNAdibhiH . jugupsA yA dehAdibrahmaparyante hyanitye bhogavastuni .. 21.. bhogyavastuni
sarvadA sthApanaM bud.hdheH shud.hdhe brahmaNi sarvadA . samyagAsthApanaM tatsamAdhAnamityuktaM na tu chittasya lAlanam
shrotriyo.avR^ijino.akAmahato yo brahmavittamaH . brahmaNyuparataH shAnto nirindhana ivAnalaH . ahetukadayAsindhurbandhurAnamatAM satAm

brahmAnandarasAnubhUtikalitaiH pUtaiH sushItairyutai\- ryuShmadvAkkalashojjhitaiH shrutisukhairvAkyAmR^itaiH sechaya . santaptaM bhavatApadAvadahanajvAlAbhirenaM prabho dhanyAste bhavadIkShaNakShaNagateH pAtrIkR^itAH svIkR^itAH
na yogena na sA~Nkhyena karmaNA no na vidyayA . brahmAtmaikatvabodhena mokShaH sidhyati nAnyathA

sukrta.text: jantUnAM narajanma durlabhamataH pu.nstvaM tato vipratA tasmAdvaidikadharmamArgaparatA vidvattvamasmAtparam . AtmAnAtmavivechanaM svanubhavo brahmAtmanA sa.nsthitiH muktirno shatajanmakoTisukR^itaiH puNyairvinA labhyate
naivAyamAnandamayaH parAtmA sopAdhikatvAtprakR^itervikArAt . kAryatvahetoH sukR^itakriyAyA vikArasa~NghAtasamAhitatvAt

apara.text: jantUnAM narajanma durlabhamataH pu.nstvaM tato vipratA tasmAdvaidikadharmamArgaparatA vidvattvamasmAtparam . AtmAnAtmavivechanaM svanubhavo brahmAtmanA sa.nsthitiH muktirno shatajanmakoTisukR^itaiH puNyairvinA labhyate

niyamitamanasAmuM tvaM svamAtmAnamAtma\- nyayamahamiti sAkShAdvid.hdhi bud.hdhiprasAdAt . janimaraNatara~NgApArasa.nsArasindhuM pratara bhava kR^itArtho brahmarUpeNa sa.nsthaH
yachchakAstyanaparaM parAtparaM pratyagekarasamAtmalakShaNam . satyachitsukhamanantamavyayaM brahma tattvamasi bhAvayAtmani
dehAtmanA sa.nsthita eva kAmI vilakShaNaH kAmayitA kathaM syAt . ato.arthasandhAnaparatvameva bhedaprasaktyA bhavabandhahetuH

dR^ishyasyAgrahaNaM kathaM nu ghaTate dehAtmanA tiShThato bAhyArthAnubhavaprasaktamanasastattatkriyAM kurvataH . sannyastAkhiladharmakarmaviShayairnityAtmaniShThAparaiH tattvaj~naiH karaNIyamAtmani sadAnandechChubhiryatnataH

AshAM Chind.hdhi viShopameShu viShayeShveShaiva mR^ityoH kR^iti\- styaktvA jAtikulAshrameShvabhimatiM mu~nchAtidUrAtkriyAH . dehAdAvasati tyajAtmadhiShaNAM praj~nAM kuruShvAtmani tvaM draShTAsyamano.asi nirdvayaparaM brahmAsi yadvastutaH .. 377.. draShTAsyamalo

vaktavyaM kimu vidyate.atra bahudhA brahmaiva jIvaH svayaM brahmaitajjagadAtataM nu sakalaM brahmAdvitIyaM shrutiH . jagadAparANu sakalaM brahmaivAhamiti prabud.hdhamatayaH santyaktabAhyAH sphuTaM brahmIbhUya vasanti santatachidAnandAtmanaitad.hdhruvam .. 394.. AnandAtmanaiva dhruvam
bud.hdhirvinaShTA galitA pravR^ittiH brahmAtmanorekatayA.adhigatyA . idaM na jAne.apyanidaM na jAne kiM vA kiyadvA sukhamastyapAram .. 481.. sukhamasya pAram

vAchA vaktumashakyameva manasA mantuM na vA shakyate svAnandAmR^itapUrapUritaparabrahmAmbudhervaibhavam . ambhorAshivishIrNavArShikashilAbhAvaM bhajanme mano yasyAMshAMshalave vilInamadhunA.a.anandAtmanA nirvR^itam

R^iNamochanakartAraH pituH santi sutAdayaH . bandhamochanakartA tu svasmAdanyo na kashchana

kartrAdibhAvaM pratipadya rAjate yatra svayaM bhAti hyayaM parAtmA . svaya~njyotirayaM dhImAtrakopAdhirasheShasAkShI na lipyate tatkR^itakarmaleshaiH . karmalepaiH yasmAdasa~Ngastata eva karmabhiH na lipyate ki~nchidupAdhinA kR^itaiH

sadidaM paramAdvaitaM svasmAdanyasya vastuno.abhAvAt . na hyanyadasti ki~nchit samyak paramArthatattvabodhadashAyAm .. 226.. paratattvabodhasudashAyAm

nidrAkalpitadeshakAlaviShayaj~nAtrAdi sarvaM yathA mithyA tadvadihApi jAgrati jagatsvAj~nAnakAryatvataH . yasmAdevamidaM sharIrakaraNaprANAhamAdyapyasat.h tasmAttattvamasi prashAntamamalaM brahmAdvayaM yatparam
yatra bhrAntyA kalpitaM tadviveke tattanmAtraM naiva tasmAdvibhinnam . svapne naShTaM svapnavishvaM vichitraM svasmAdbhinnaM kinnu dR^iShTaM prabodhe

lokavAsanayA jantoH shAstravAsanayApi cha . dehavAsanayA j~nAnaM yathAvannaiva jAyate .. 271 sa.nsArakArAgR^ihamokShamichCho\- rayomayaM pAdanibandhashR^i~Nkhalam . nibad.hdha vadanti tajj~nAH paTu vAsanAtrayaM yo.asmAdvimuktaH samupaiti muktim

vINAyA rUpasaundaryaM tantrIvAdanasauShThavam . prajAra~njanamAtraM tanna sAmrAjyAya kalpate
aj~nAnasarpadaShTasya brahmaj~nAnauShadhaM vinA . kimu vedaishcha shAstraishcha kimu mantraiH kimauShadhaiH
na gachChati vinA pAnaM vyAdhirauShadhashabdataH . vinA.aparokShAnubhavaM brahmashabdairna muchyate
nAstrairna shastrairanilena vahninA ChettuM na shakyo na cha karmakoTibhiH . vivekavij~nAnamahAsinA vinA dhAtuH prasAdena shitena ma~njunA
deho.ayamannabhavano.annamayastu kosha\- shchAnnena jIvati vinashyati tadvihInaH . hyannena tvak.hcharmamA.nsarudhirAsthipurISharAshi\- rnAyaM svayaM bhavitumarhati nityashud.hdhaH

vairAgyaM cha mumukShutvaM tIvraM yasya tu vidyate . tasminnevArthavantaH syuH phalavantaH shamAdayaH

hetuka.text: shrotriyo.avR^ijino.akAmahato yo brahmavittamaH . brahmaNyuparataH shAnto nirindhana ivAnalaH . ahetukadayAsindhurbandhurAnamatAM satAm

vairAgyaM cha mumukShutvaM tIvraM yasya tu vidyate . tasminnevArthavantaH syuH phalavantaH shamAdayaH
kathaM tareyaM bhavasindhumetaM kA vA gatirme katamo.astyupAyaH . jAne na ki~nchitkR^ipayA.ava mAM prabho sa.nsAraduHkhakShatimAtanuShva
mA bhaiShTa vidva.nstava nAstyapAyaH sa.nsArasindhostaraNe.astyupAyaH . yenaiva yAtA yatayo.asya pAraM tameva mArgaM tava nirdishAmi
R^iNamochanakartAraH pituH santi sutAdayaH . bandhamochanakartA tu svasmAdanyo na kashchana
ahammameti prathitaM sharIraM mohAspadaM sthUlamitIryate budhaiH . nabhonabhasvaddahanAmbubhUmayaH sUkShmANi bhUtAni bhavanti tAni
parasparAMshairmilitAni bhUtvA sthUlAni cha sthUlasharIrahetavaH . mAtrAstadIyA viShayA bhavanti shabdAdayaH pa~ncha sukhAya bhoktuH
doSheNa tIvro viShayaH kR^iShNasarpaviShAdapi . viShaM nihanti bhoktAraM draShTAraM chakShuShApyayam
sarvo.api bAhyasa.nsAraH puruShasya yadAshrayaH . vid.hdhi dehamidaM sthUlaM gR^ihavad.hgR^ihamedhinaH

kenApi mR^id.hbhinnatayA svarUpaM ghaTasya sandarshayituM na shakyate . ato ghaTaH kalpita eva mohA\- nmR^ideva satyaM paramArthabhUtam

atha.text: labdhvA katha~nchinnarajanma durlabhaM tatrApi pu.nstvaM shrutipAradarshanam . yastvAtmamuktau na yateta mUDhadhIH sa hyAtmahA svaM vinihantyasad.hgrahAt

andhatvamandatvapaTutvadharmAH sauguNyavaiguNyavashAd.hdhi chakShuShaH . bAdhiryamUkatvamukhAstathaiva shrotrAdidharmA na tu vetturAtmanaH
shud.hdhAdvayabrahmavibodhanAshyA sarpabhramo rajjuvivekato yathA . rajastamaHsattvamiti prasid.hdhA guNAstadIyAH prathitaiH svakAryaiH

yAvad.hbhrAntistAvadevAsya sattA mithyAj~nAnojjR^imbhitasya pramAdAt . rajjvAM sarpo bhrAntikAlIna eva bhrAnternAshe naiva sarpo.api tadvat .. 197.. sarpo.asti
satyaM yadi syAjjagadetadAtmano.a nantattvahAnirnigamApramANatA . asatyavAditvamapIshituH syA\- nnaitattrayaM sAdhu hitaM mahAtmanAm
athAta Adesha iti shrutiH svayaM niShedhati brahmaNi kalpitaM dvayam . shrutipramANAnugR^ihItabodhA\- ttayornirAsaH karaNIya eva
pramAdo brahmaniShThAyAM na kartavyaH kadAchana . pramAdo mR^ityurityAha bhagavAnbrahmaNaH sutaH
na pramAdAdanartho.anyo j~nAninaH svasvarUpataH . tato mohastato.ahandhIstato bandhastato vyathA
lakShyachyutaM chedyadi chittamIShad.h bahirmukhaM sannipatettatastataH . pramAdataH prachyutakelikandukaH sopAnapa~N.hktau patito yathA tathA

adhikAriNamAshAste phalasid.hdhirvisheShataH . upAyA deshakAlAdyAH santyasminsahakAriNaH .. 14.. santyasyAM

tathA vadantaM sharaNAgataM svaM sa.nsAradAvAnalatApataptam . nirIkShya kAruNyarasArdradR^iShTyA dadyAdabhItiM sahasA mahAtmA
yastvayAdya kR^itaH prashno varIyA~nChAstravinmataH . sammataH sUtraprAyo nigUDhArtho j~nAtavyashcha mumukShubhiH
mokShasya hetuH prathamo nigadyate vairAgyamatyantamanityavastuShu . tataH shamashchApi damastitikShA nyAsaH prasaktAkhilakarmaNAM bhR^isham
anukShaNaM yatparihR^itya kR^ityaM anAdyavidyAkR^itabandhamokShaNam . dehaH parArtho.ayamamuShya poShaNe yaH sajjate sa svamanena hanti

svar.text: itaH ko nvasti mUDhAtmA yastu svArthe pramAdyati . durlabhaM mAnuShaM dehaM prApya tatrApi pauruSham
vastusvarUpaM sphuTabodhachakShuShA svenaiva vedyaM na tu paNDitena . chandrasvarUpaM nijachakShuShaiva j~nAtavyamanyairavagamyate kim
atha te sampravakShyAmi svarUpaM paramAtmanaH . yadvij~nAya naro bandhAnmuktaH kaivalyamashnute
aha~NkArAdidehAntA viShayAshcha sukhAdayaH . vedyante ghaTavadyena nityabodhasvarUpiNA
tva~N.hmA.nsamedo.asthipurISharAshA\- vahammatiM mUDhajanaH karoti . vilakShaNaM vetti vichArashIlo nijasvarUpaM paramArthabhUtam
jIvatvaM na tato.anyastu svarUpeNa vilakShaNaH . tato.anyattu sambandhastvAtmano bud.hdhyA mithyAj~nAnapuraHsaraH .. 201.. sambandhaH svAtmano
mR^itkAryabhUto.api mR^ido na bhinnaH kumbho.asti sarvatra tu mR^itsvarUpAt . na kumbharUpaM pR^ithagasti kumbhaH kuto mR^iShA kalpitanAmamAtraH

antar.text: vadantu shAstrANi yajantu devAn.h kurvantu karmANi bhajantu devatAH . Atmaikyabodhena vinApi mukti\- rna sidhyati brahmashatAntare.api
Adau nityAnityavastuvivekaH parigaNyate . ihAmutraphalabhogavirAgastadanantaram . shamAdiShaT.hkasampattirmumukShutvamiti sphuTam
tataH shrutistanmananaM satattva\- dhyAnaM chiraM nityanirantaraM muneH . tato.avikalpaM parametya vidvAn.h ihaiva nirvANasukhaM samR^ichChati
ApAtavairAgyavato mumukShUn.h bhavAbdhipAraM pratiyAtumudyatAn . AshAgraho majjayate.antarAle nigR^ihya kaNThe vinivartya vegAt
eSho.antarAtmA puruShaH purANo nirantarAkhaNDasukhAnubhUtiH . sadaikarUpaH pratibodhamAtro yeneShitA vAgasavashcharanti
naivAtmApi prANamayo vAyuvikAro gantA.a.agantA vAyuvadantarbahireShaH . yasmAtki~nchitkvApi na vettIShTamaniShTaM svaM vAnyaM vA ki~nchana nityaM paratantraH
nityaM vibhuM sarvagataM susUkShmaM antarbahiHshUnyamananyamAtmanaH . vij~nAya samya~N.hnijarUpametat.h pumAn vipApmA virajo vimR^ityuH
satyaM j~nAnamanantaM brahma vishud.hdhaM paraM svataHsid.hdham . nityAnandaikarasaM pratyagabhinnaM nirantaraM jayati
ataH paraM brahma sadadvitIyaM vishud.hdhavij~nAnaghanaM nira~njanam . prashAntamAdyantavihInamakriyaM nirantarAnandarasasvarUpam

karma.text: vadantu shAstrANi yajantu devAn.h kurvantu karmANi bhajantu devatAH . Atmaikyabodhena vinApi mukti\- rna sidhyati brahmashatAntare.api
amR^itattvasya nAshAsti vittenetyeva hi shrutiH . bravIti karmaNo mukterahetutvaM sphuTaM yataH
sannyasya sarvakarmANi bhavabandhavimuktaye . yatyatAM paNDitairdhIrairAtmAbhyAsa upasthitaiH
chittasya shud.hdhaye karma na tu vastUpalabdhaye . vastusid.hdhirvichAreNa na ki~nchitkarmakoTibhiH
pathyamauShadhasevA cha kriyate yena rogiNA . Arogyasid.hdhirdR^iShTA.asya nAnyAnuShThitakarmaNA
na yogena na sA~Nkhyena karmaNA no na vidyayA . brahmAtmaikatvabodhena mokShaH sidhyati nAnyathA
mokShasya hetuH prathamo nigadyate vairAgyamatyantamanityavastuShu . tataH shamashchApi damastitikShA nyAsaH prasaktAkhilakarmaNAM bhR^isham
ya eShu mUDhA viShayeShu bad.hdhA rAgorupAshena sudurdamena . AyAnti niryAntyadha UrdhvamuchchaiH svakarmadUtena javena nItAH
pa~nchIkR^itebhyo bhUtebhyaH sthUlebhyaH pUrvakarmaNA . samutpannamidaM sthUlaM bhogAyatanamAtmanaH . avasthA jAgarastasya sthUlArthAnubhavo yataH

sastr.text: vadantu shAstrANi yajantu devAn.h kurvantu karmANi bhajantu devatAH . Atmaikyabodhena vinApi mukti\- rna sidhyati brahmashatAntare.api
shAstrasya guruvAkyasya satyabud.hdhyavadhAraNam . satyabud.hdhyAvadhAraNA sA shrad.hdhA kathitA sad.hbhiryayA vastUpalabhyate
vAgvaikharI shabdajharI shAstravyAkhyAnakaushalam . vaiduShyaM viduShAM tadvad.hbhuktaye na tu muktaye
avij~nAte pare tattve shAstrAdhItistu niShphalA . vij~nAte.api pare tattve shAstrAdhItistu niShphalA
aj~nAnasarpadaShTasya brahmaj~nAnauShadhaM vinA . kimu vedaishcha shAstraishcha kimu mantraiH kimauShadhaiH
viShayAshAmahApAshAdyo vimuktaH sudustyajAt . sa eva kalpate muktyai nAnyaH ShaT.hshAstravedyapi
nAstrairna shastrairanilena vahninA ChettuM na shakyo na cha karmakoTibhiH . vivekavij~nAnamahAsinA vinA dhAtuH prasAdena shitena ma~njunA
lokAnuvartanaM tyaktvA tyaktvA dehAnuvartanam . shAstrAnuvartanaM tyaktvA svAdhyAsApanayaM kuru

lokavAsanayA jantoH shAstravAsanayApi cha . dehavAsanayA j~nAnaM yathAvannaiva jAyate .. 271 sa.nsArakArAgR^ihamokShamichCho\- rayomayaM pAdanibandhashR^i~Nkhalam . nibad.hdha vadanti tajj~nAH paTu vAsanAtrayaM yo.asmAdvimuktaH samupaiti muktim
svasyAvidyAbandhasambandhamokShA\- tsatyaj~nAnAnandarUpAtmalabdhau . shAstraM yuktirdeshikoktiH pramANaM chAntaHsid.hdhA svAnubhUtiH pramANam

vatah.text: vadantu shAstrANi yajantu devAn.h kurvantu karmANi bhajantu devatAH . Atmaikyabodhena vinApi mukti\- rna sidhyati brahmashatAntare.api
AtmArthatvena hi preyAnviShayo na svataH priyaH . svata eva hi sarveShAmAtmA priyatamo yataH . tata AtmA sadAnando nAsya duHkhaM kadAchana
svayaM parichChedamupetya bud.hdheH tAdAtmyadoSheNa paraM mR^iShAtmanaH . sarvAtmakaH sannapi vIkShate svayaM svataH pR^ithak.htvena mR^ido ghaTAniva
satyaM j~nAnamanantaM brahma vishud.hdhaM paraM svataHsid.hdham . nityAnandaikarasaM pratyagabhinnaM nirantaraM jayati

nidrAkalpitadeshakAlaviShayaj~nAtrAdi sarvaM yathA mithyA tadvadihApi jAgrati jagatsvAj~nAnakAryatvataH . yasmAdevamidaM sharIrakaraNaprANAhamAdyapyasat.h tasmAttattvamasi prashAntamamalaM brahmAdvayaM yatparam
sarvatra sarvataH sarvabrahmamAtrAvalokanaiH . mAtrAvalokanam sad.hbhAvavAsanAdArDhyAttat.htrayaM layamashnute

dR^ishyasyAgrahaNaM kathaM nu ghaTate dehAtmanA tiShThato bAhyArthAnubhavaprasaktamanasastattatkriyAM kurvataH . sannyastAkhiladharmakarmaviShayairnityAtmaniShThAparaiH tattvaj~naiH karaNIyamAtmani sadAnandechChubhiryatnataH
atyantavairAgyavataH samAdhiH samAhitasyaiva dR^iDhaprabodhaH . prabud.hdhatattvasya hi bandhamuktiH muktAtmano nityasukhAnubhUtiH
sadevedaM sarvaM jagadavagataM vA~N.hmanasayoH sato.anyannAstyeva prakR^itiparasImni sthitavataH . pR^ithak kiM mR^itsnAyAH kalashaghaTakumbhAdyavagataM vadatyeSha bhrAntastvamahamiti mAyAmadirayA

asat.text: vadantu shAstrANi yajantu devAn.h kurvantu karmANi bhajantu devatAH . Atmaikyabodhena vinApi mukti\- rna sidhyati brahmashatAntare.api
arthasya nishchayo dR^iShTo vichAreNa hitoktitaH . na snAnena na dAnena prANAyAmashatena vA
vidvAn sa tasmA upasattimIyuShe mumukShave sAdhu yathoktakAriNe . prashAntachittAya shamAnvitAya tattvopadeshaM kR^ipayaiva kuryAt
eShA.a.avR^itirnAma tamoguNasya shaktirmayA vastvavabhAsate.anyathA . shaktiryayA saiShA nidAnaM puruShasya sa.nsR^iteH vikShepashakteH pravaNasya hetuH .. 113.. prasarasya
vishud.hdhasattvasya guNAH prasAdaH svAtmAnubhUtiH paramA prashAntiH . tR^iptiH praharShaH paramAtmaniShThA yayA sadAnandarasaM samR^ichChati
atraiva sattvAtmani dhIguhAyAM avyAkR^itAkAsha ushatprakAshaH . uruprakAshaH AkAsha uchchai ravivatprakAshate svatejasA vishvamidaM prakAshayan
prakR^itivikR^itibhinnaH shud.hdhabodhasvabhAvaH sadasadidamasheShaM bhAsayannirvisheShaH . vilasati paramAtmA jAgradAdiShvavasthA\- svahamahamiti sAkShAtsAkShirUpeNa bud.hdheH
atrAnAtmanyahamiti matirbandha eSho.asya puMsaH prApto.aj~nAnAjjananamaraNakleshasampAtahetuH . yenaivAyaM vapuridamasatsatyamityAtmabud.hdhyA puShyatyukShatyavati viShayaistantubhiH koshakR^idvat
dehendriyAdAvasati bhramoditAM vidvAnahantAM na jahAti yAvat . tAvanna tasyAsti vimuktivArtA\- pyastveSha vedAntanayAntadarshI

bhaj.text: vadantu shAstrANi yajantu devAn.h kurvantu karmANi bhajantu devatAH . Atmaikyabodhena vinApi mukti\- rna sidhyati brahmashatAntare.api
mokShasya kA~NkShA yadi vai tavAsti tyajAtidUrAdviShayAnviShaM yathA . pIyUShavattoShadayAkShamArjava\- prashAntidAntIrbhaja nityamAdarAt
atrAtmabud.hdhiM tyaja mUDhabud.hdhe tva~N.hmA.nsamedo.asthipurISharAshau . sarvAtmani brahmaNi nirvikalpe kuruShva shAntiM paramAM bhajasva
samyagvivekaH sphuTabodhajanyo vibhajya dR^igdR^ishyapadArthatattvam . Chinatti mAyAkR^itamohabandhaM yasmAdvimuktastu punarna sa.nsR^itiH .. 345.. vimuktasya
itthaM vipashchitsadasadvibhajya nishchitya tattvaM nijabodhadR^iShTyA . j~nAtvA svamAtmAnamakhaNDabodhaM tebhyo vimuktaH svayameva shAmyati
vAchaM niyachChAtmani taM niyachCha bud.hdhau dhiyaM yachCha cha bud.hdhisAkShiNi . taM chApi pUrNAtmani nirvikalpe vilApya shAntiM paramAM bhajasva

shavAkAraM yAvadbhajati manujastAvadashuchiH parebhyaH syAtklesho jananamaraNavyAdhinilayaH . vyAdhinirayAH yadAtmAnaM shud.hdhaM kalayati shivAkAramachalam.h tadA tebhyo mukto bhavati hi tadAha shrutirapi

vAchA vaktumashakyameva manasA mantuM na vA shakyate svAnandAmR^itapUrapUritaparabrahmAmbudhervaibhavam . ambhorAshivishIrNavArShikashilAbhAvaM bhajanme mano yasyAMshAMshalave vilInamadhunA.a.anandAtmanA nirvR^itam
akhaNDabodhAtmani nirvikalpe vikalpanaM vyomni puraprakalpanam . tadadvayAnandamayAtmanA sadA shAntiM parAmetya bhajasva maunam

sphutam.text: amR^itattvasya nAshAsti vittenetyeva hi shrutiH . bravIti karmaNo mukterahetutvaM sphuTaM yataH
Adau nityAnityavastuvivekaH parigaNyate . ihAmutraphalabhogavirAgastadanantaram . shamAdiShaT.hkasampattirmumukShutvamiti sphuTam

praj~nAvAnapi paNDito.api chaturo.apyatyantasUkShmAtmadR^ig.h\- vyAlIDhastamasA na vetti bahudhA sambodhito.api sphuTam . bhrAntyAropitameva sAdhu kalayatyAlambate tad.hguNAn.h hantAsau prabalA durantatamasaH shaktirmahatyAvR^itiH
prabodhe svapnavatsarvaM sahamUlaM vinashyati . anAdyapIdaM no nityaM prAgabhAva iva sphuTam
jalaM pa~NkavadatyantaM pa~NkApAye jalaM sphuTam . pa~NkavadaspaShTaM yathA bhAti tathAtmApi doShAbhAve sphuTaprabhaH
asannivR^ittau tu sadAtmanA sphuTaM pratItiretasya bhavetpratIchaH . tato nirAsaH karaNIya eva sadAtmanaH sAdhvahamAdivastunaH .. 205.. asadAtmanaH
antaHshritAnantadurantavAsanA\- dhUlIviliptA paramAtmavAsanA . praj~nAtisa~NgharShaNato vishud.hdhA pratIyate chandanagandhavat sphuTam .. 274.. sphuTA
anAtmavAsanAjAlaistirobhUtAtmavAsanA . nityAtmaniShThayA teShAM nAshe bhAti svayaM sphuTam .. 275.. sphuTA
vikAriNAM sarvavikAravettA nityAvikAro bhavituM samarhati . nityo.avikAro manorathasvapnasuShuptiShu sphuTaM punaH punardR^iShTamasattvametayoH
tasmAdaha~NkAramimaM svashatruM bhokturgale kaNTakavatpratItam . vichChidya vij~nAnamahAsinA sphuTaM bhu~N.hkShvAtmasAmrAjyasukhaM yatheShTam

vastusvarUpaM sphuTabodhachakShuShA svenaiva vedyaM na tu paNDitena . chandrasvarUpaM nijachakShuShaiva j~nAtavyamanyairavagamyate kim

jalaM pa~NkavadatyantaM pa~NkApAye jalaM sphuTam . pa~NkavadaspaShTaM yathA bhAti tathAtmApi doShAbhAve sphuTaprabhaH
asannivR^ittau tu sadAtmanA sphuTaM pratItiretasya bhavetpratIchaH . tato nirAsaH karaNIya eva sadAtmanaH sAdhvahamAdivastunaH .. 205.. asadAtmanaH

jAgratsvapnasuShuptiShu sphuTataraM yo.asau samujjR^imbhate pratyagrUpatayA sadAhamahamityantaH sphurannaikadhA . sphurannekadhA nAnAkAravikArabhAgina imAn pashyannahandhImukhAn.h nityAnandachidAtmanA sphurati taM vid.hdhi svametaM hR^idi
antaHshritAnantadurantavAsanA\- dhUlIviliptA paramAtmavAsanA . praj~nAtisa~NgharShaNato vishud.hdhA pratIyate chandanagandhavat sphuTam .. 274.. sphuTA
anAtmavAsanAjAlaistirobhUtAtmavAsanA . nityAtmaniShThayA teShAM nAshe bhAti svayaM sphuTam .. 275.. sphuTA

srutih.text: amR^itattvasya nAshAsti vittenetyeva hi shrutiH . bravIti karmaNo mukterahetutvaM sphuTaM yataH
yatsuShuptau nirviShaya AtmAnando.anubhUyate . shrutiH pratyakShamaitihyamanumAnaM cha jAgrati
athAta Adesha iti shrutiH svayaM niShedhati brahmaNi kalpitaM dvayam . shrutipramANAnugR^ihItabodhA\- ttayornirAsaH karaNIya eva
ahampadArthastvahamAdisAkShI nityaM suShuptAvapi bhAvadarshanAt . brUte hyajo nitya iti shrutiH svayaM tatpratyagAtmA sadasadvilakShaNaH
sa~NkalpaM varjayettasmAtsarvAnarthasya kAraNam . apathyAni hi vastUni vyAdhigrasto yathotsR^ije . jIvato yasya kaivalyaM videhe sa cha kevalaH . yatki~nchit pashyato bhedaM bhayaM brUte yajuHshrutiH
sarvAtmasid.hdhaye bhikShoH kR^itashravaNakarmaNaH . sArvAtmya samAdhiM vidadhAtyeShA shAnto dAnta iti shrutiH
kriyAsamabhihAreNa yatra nAnyaditi shrutiH . bravIti dvaitarAhityaM mithyAdhyAsanivR^ittaye

vaktavyaM kimu vidyate.atra bahudhA brahmaiva jIvaH svayaM brahmaitajjagadAtataM nu sakalaM brahmAdvitIyaM shrutiH . jagadAparANu sakalaM brahmaivAhamiti prabud.hdhamatayaH santyaktabAhyAH sphuTaM brahmIbhUya vasanti santatachidAnandAtmanaitad.hdhruvam .. 394.. AnandAtmanaiva dhruvam
mAyAmAtramidaM dvaitamadvaitaM paramArthataH . iti brUte shrutiH sAkShAtsuShuptAvanubhUyate
samAdhAtuM bAhyadR^iShTyA prArabdhaM vadati shrutiH . na tu dehAdisatyatvabodhanAya vipashchitAm . yataH shruterabhiprAyaH paramArthaikagocharaH

samahita.text: ato vimuktyai prayateta vidvAn.h sannyastabAhyArthasukhaspR^ihaH san . santaM mahAntaM samupetya deshikaM tenopadiShTArthasamAhitAtmA
naivAyamAnandamayaH parAtmA sopAdhikatvAtprakR^itervikArAt . kAryatvahetoH sukR^itakriyAyA vikArasa~NghAtasamAhitatvAt
dR^ishyaM pratItaM pravilApayansan.h sanmAtramAnandaghanaM vibhAvayan . samAhitaH sanbahirantaraM vA kAlaM nayethAH sati karmabandhe
ataH pramAdAnna paro.asti mR^ityuH vivekino brahmavidaH samAdhau . samAhitaH sid.hdhimupaiti samyak.h samAhitAtmA bhava sAvadhAnaH
samAhitA ye pravilApya bAhyaM shrotrAdi chetaH svamahaM chidAtmani . ta eva muktA bhavapAshabandhaiH nAnye tu pArokShyakathAbhidhAyinaH

samAhitAntaHkaraNaH svarUpe vilokayAtmAnamakhaNDavaibhavam . vichChind.hdhi bandhaM bhavagandhagandhitaM yatnena puMstvaM saphalIkuruShva .. 411 sarvopAdhivinirmuktaM sachchidAnandamadvayam . bhAvayAtmAnamAtmasthaM na bhUyaH kalpase.adhvane
iti guruvachanAchChrutipramANAt.h paramavagamya satattvamAtmayuktyA . prashamitakaraNaH samAhitAtmA kvachidachalAkR^itirAtmaniShThato.abhUt .. 479.. AtmaniShThito

vidvAn sa tasmA upasattimIyuShe mumukShave sAdhu yathoktakAriNe . prashAntachittAya shamAnvitAya tattvopadeshaM kR^ipayaiva kuryAt
mA bhaiShTa vidva.nstava nAstyapAyaH sa.nsArasindhostaraNe.astyupAyaH . yenaiva yAtA yatayo.asya pAraM tameva mArgaM tava nirdishAmi
tataH shrutistanmananaM satattva\- dhyAnaM chiraM nityanirantaraM muneH . tato.avikalpaM parametya vidvAn.h ihaiva nirvANasukhaM samR^ichChati

shrIgururuvAcha . satyamuktaM tvayA vidvannipuNo.asi vichAraNe . ahamAdivikArAste tadabhAvo.ayamapyanu .. 213.. .ayamapyatha
brahmabhUtastu sa.nsR^ityai vidvAnnAvartate punaH . vij~nAtavyamataH samyagbrahmAbhinnatvamAtmanaH

sAdhanAnyatra chatvAri kathitAni manIShibhiH . yeShu satsveva sanniShThA yadabhAve na sidhyati
sahanaM sarvaduHkhAnAmapratIkArapUrvakam . chintAvilAparahitaM sA titikShA nigadyate
shAstrasya guruvAkyasya satyabud.hdhyavadhAraNam . satyabud.hdhyAvadhAraNA sA shrad.hdhA kathitA sad.hbhiryayA vastUpalabhyate

ayaM svabhAvaH svata eva yatpara\- shramApanodapravaNaM mahAtmanAm . sudhA.nshureSha svayamarkakarkasha\- prabhAbhitaptAmavati kShitiM kila

brahmAnandarasAnubhUtikalitaiH pUtaiH sushItairyutai\- ryuShmadvAkkalashojjhitaiH shrutisukhairvAkyAmR^itaiH sechaya . santaptaM bhavatApadAvadahanajvAlAbhirenaM prabho dhanyAste bhavadIkShaNakShaNagateH pAtrIkR^itAH svIkR^itAH
pathyamauShadhasevA cha kriyate yena rogiNA . Arogyasid.hdhirdR^iShTA.asya nAnyAnuShThitakarmaNA

anistha.text: vishud.hdhasattvasya guNAH prasAdaH svAtmAnubhUtiH paramA prashAntiH . tR^iptiH praharShaH paramAtmaniShThA yayA sadAnandarasaM samR^ichChati
brahmaivedaM vishvamityeva vANI shrautI brUte.atharvaniShThA variShThA . tasmAdetad.hbrahmamAtraM hi vishvaM nAdhiShThAnAd.hbhinnatA.a.aropitasya
ahaM mameti yo bhAvo dehAkShAdAvanAtmani . adhyAso.ayaM nirastavyo viduShA svAtmaniShThayA
anAtmavAsanAjAlaistirobhUtAtmavAsanA . nityAtmaniShThayA teShAM nAshe bhAti svayaM sphuTam .. 275.. sphuTA
anAdAnavisargAbhyAmIShannAsti kriyA muneH . annAdAnavisargA tadekaniShThayA nityaM svAdhyAsApanayaM kuru
pramAdo brahmaniShThAyAM na kartavyaH kadAchana . pramAdo mR^ityurityAha bhagavAnbrahmaNaH sutaH
sarvAtmanA bandhavimuktihetuH sarvAtmabhAvAnna paro.asti kashchit . dR^ishyAgrahe satyupapadyate.asau sarvAtmabhAvo.asya sadAtmaniShThayA

dR^ishyasyAgrahaNaM kathaM nu ghaTate dehAtmanA tiShThato bAhyArthAnubhavaprasaktamanasastattatkriyAM kurvataH . sannyastAkhiladharmakarmaviShayairnityAtmaniShThAparaiH tattvaj~naiH karaNIyamAtmani sadAnandechChubhiryatnataH
sati sakto naro yAti sadbhAvaM hyekaniShThayA . kITako bhramaraM dhyAyan bhramaratvAya kalpate

arudha.text: chidAtmani sadAnande dehArUDhAmahandhiyam . niveshya li~NgamutsR^ijya kevalo bhava sarvadA
ArUDhashakterahamo vinAshaH kartunna shakya sahasApi paNDitaiH . kartuM na ye nirvikalpAkhyasamAdhinishchalAH tAnantarA.anantabhavA hi vAsanAH

ajna.text: tadvairAgyaM jihAsA yA darshanashravaNAdibhiH . jugupsA yA dehAdibrahmaparyante hyanitye bhogavastuni .. 21.. bhogyavastuni
vairAgyaM cha mumukShutvaM tIvraM yasya tu vidyate . tasminnevArthavantaH syuH phalavantaH shamAdayaH
svAtmatattvAnusandhAnaM bhaktirityapare jaguH . uktasAdhanasampannastattvajij~nAsurAtmanaH . upasIded.hguruM prAj~naM yasmAd.hbandhavimokShaNam
aj~nAnayogAtparamAtmanastava hyanAtmabandhastata eva sa.nsR^itiH . tayorvivekoditabodhavahniH aj~nAnakAryaM pradahetsamUlam
shabdajAlaM mahAraNyaM chittabhramaNakAraNam . ataH prayatnAjj~nAtavyaM tattvaj~naistattvamAtmanaH .. 60.. tattvaj~nAttattva
aj~nAnasarpadaShTasya brahmaj~nAnauShadhaM vinA . kimu vedaishcha shAstraishcha kimu mantraiH kimauShadhaiH
akR^itvA dR^ishyavilayamaj~nAtvA tattvamAtmanaH . brahmashabdaiH kuto muktiruktimAtraphalairnR^iNAm .. 63.. bAhyashabdaiH
mokShasya hetuH prathamo nigadyate vairAgyamatyantamanityavastuShu . tataH shamashchApi damastitikShA nyAsaH prasaktAkhilakarmaNAM bhR^isham

sara.text: durvArasa.nsAradavAgnitaptaM dodhUyamAnaM duradR^iShTavAtaiH . bhItaM prapannaM paripAhi mR^ityoH sharaNyamanyadyadahaM na jAne .. 36.. anyaM
kathaM tareyaM bhavasindhumetaM kA vA gatirme katamo.astyupAyaH . jAne na ki~nchitkR^ipayA.ava mAM prabho sa.nsAraduHkhakShatimAtanuShva
tathA vadantaM sharaNAgataM svaM sa.nsAradAvAnalatApataptam . nirIkShya kAruNyarasArdradR^iShTyA dadyAdabhItiM sahasA mahAtmA
mA bhaiShTa vidva.nstava nAstyapAyaH sa.nsArasindhostaraNe.astyupAyaH . yenaiva yAtA yatayo.asya pAraM tameva mArgaM tava nirdishAmi
astyupAyo mahAnkashchitsa.nsArabhayanAshanaH . tena tIrtvA bhavAmbhodhiM paramAnandamApsyasi
sarvo.api bAhyasa.nsAraH puruShasya yadAshrayaH . vid.hdhi dehamidaM sthUlaM gR^ihavad.hgR^ihamedhinaH
kAmaH krodho lobhadambhAdyasUyA aha~NkArerShyAmatsarAdyAstu ghorAH . dharmA ete rAjasAH pumpravR^itti\- ryasmAdeShA tadrajo bandhahetuH .. 112.. yasmAdetattadrajo
eShA.a.avR^itirnAma tamoguNasya shaktirmayA vastvavabhAsate.anyathA . shaktiryayA saiShA nidAnaM puruShasya sa.nsR^iteH vikShepashakteH pravaNasya hetuH .. 113.. prasarasya

stha.text: sAdhanAnyatra chatvAri kathitAni manIShibhiH . yeShu satsveva sanniShThA yadabhAve na sidhyati
virajya viShayavrAtAddoShadR^iShTyA muhurmuhuH . svalakShye niyatAvasthA manasaH shama uchyate
viShayebhyaH parAvartya sthApanaM svasvagolake . ubhayeShAmindriyANAM sa damaH parikIrtitaH . bAhyAnAlambanaM vR^ittereShoparatiruttamA
sarvadA sthApanaM bud.hdheH shud.hdhe brahmaNi sarvadA . samyagAsthApanaM tatsamAdhAnamityuktaM na tu chittasya lAlanam
shrad.hdhAbhaktidhyAnayogAnmumukShoH mukterhetUnvakti sAkShAchChrutergIH . yo vA eteShveva tiShThatyamuShya mokSho.avidyAkalpitAddehabandhAt
ko nAma bandhaH kathameSha AgataH kathaM pratiShThAsya kathaM vimokShaH . ko.asAvanAtmA paramaH ka AtmA tayorvivekaH kathametaduchyatAm
vINAyA rUpasaundaryaM tantrIvAdanasauShThavam . prajAra~njanamAtraM tanna sAmrAjyAya kalpate
pa~nchIkR^itebhyo bhUtebhyaH sthUlebhyaH pUrvakarmaNA . samutpannamidaM sthUlaM bhogAyatanamAtmanaH . avasthA jAgarastasya sthUlArthAnubhavo yataH

pandita.text: sannyasya sarvakarmANi bhavabandhavimuktaye . yatyatAM paNDitairdhIrairAtmAbhyAsa upasthitaiH
tasmAtsarvaprayatnena bhavabandhavimuktaye . svaireva yatnaH kartavyo rogAdAviva paNDitaiH .. 66.. rogAderiva
ataH prAhurmano.avidyAM paNDitAstattvadarshinaH . yenaiva bhrAmyate vishvaM vAyunevAbhramaNDalam
kaH paNDitaH sansadasadvivekI shrutipramANaH paramArthadarshI . jAnanhi kuryAdasato.avalambaM svapAtahetoH shishuvanmumukShuH
ArUDhashakterahamo vinAshaH kartunna shakya sahasApi paNDitaiH . kartuM na ye nirvikalpAkhyasamAdhinishchalAH tAnantarA.anantabhavA hi vAsanAH
ananyatvamadhiShThAnAdAropyasya nirIkShitam . paNDitai rajjusarpAdau vikalpo bhrAntijIvanaH

andha.text: sannyasya sarvakarmANi bhavabandhavimuktaye . yatyatAM paNDitairdhIrairAtmAbhyAsa upasthitaiH
svAtmatattvAnusandhAnaM bhaktirityapare jaguH . uktasAdhanasampannastattvajij~nAsurAtmanaH . upasIded.hguruM prAj~naM yasmAd.hbandhavimokShaNam
shrad.hdhAbhaktidhyAnayogAnmumukShoH mukterhetUnvakti sAkShAchChrutergIH . yo vA eteShveva tiShThatyamuShya mokSho.avidyAkalpitAddehabandhAt
aj~nAnayogAtparamAtmanastava hyanAtmabandhastata eva sa.nsR^itiH . tayorvivekoditabodhavahniH aj~nAnakAryaM pradahetsamUlam
ko nAma bandhaH kathameSha AgataH kathaM pratiShThAsya kathaM vimokShaH . ko.asAvanAtmA paramaH ka AtmA tayorvivekaH kathametaduchyatAm
shrIguruvAcha . dhanyo.asi kR^itakR^ityo.asi pAvitaM te kulaM tvayA . pAvitaM yadavidyAbandhamuktyA brahmIbhavitumichChasi
R^iNamochanakartAraH pituH santi sutAdayaH . bandhamochanakartA tu svasmAdanyo na kashchana

tyat.text: sannyasya sarvakarmANi bhavabandhavimuktaye . yatyatAM paNDitairdhIrairAtmAbhyAsa upasthitaiH
atrAnAtmanyahamiti matirbandha eSho.asya puMsaH prApto.aj~nAnAjjananamaraNakleshasampAtahetuH . yenaivAyaM vapuridamasatsatyamityAtmabud.hdhyA puShyatyukShatyavati viShayaistantubhiH koshakR^idvat
vivekavairAgyaguNAtirekA\- chChud.hdhatvamAsAdya mano vimuktyai . bhavatyato bud.hdhimato mumukSho\- stAbhyAM dR^iDhAbhyAM bhavitavyamagre
mano nAma mahAvyAghro viShayAraNyabhUmiShu . charatyatra na gachChantu sAdhavo ye mumukShavaH
anAtmavAsanAjAlaistirobhUtAtmavAsanA . nityAtmaniShThayA teShAM nAshe bhAti svayaM sphuTam .. 275.. sphuTA
nAhaM jIvaH paraM brahmetyatad.hvyAvR^ittipUrvakam . vAsanAvegataH prAptasvAdhyAsApanayaM kuru

brahmAnandanidhirmahAbalavatA.aha~NkAraghorAhinA saMveShTyAtmani rakShyate guNamayaishchaNDestribhirmastakaiH vij~nAnAkhyamahAsinA shrutimatA vichChidya shIrShatrayaM nirmUlyAhimimaM nidhiM sukhakaraM dhIro.anubhoktu~NkShamaH
yadA kadA vApi vipashchideSha brahmaNyanante.apyaNumAtrabhedam . pashyatyathAmuShya bhayaM tadaiva yadvIkShitaM bhinnatayA pramAdAt .. 330.. yadIkShitaM
yatirasadanusandhiM bandhahetuM vihAya svayamayamahamasmItyAtmadR^iShTyaiva tiShThet.h sukhayati nanu niShThA brahmaNi svAnubhUtyA harati paramavidyAkAryaduHkhaM pratItam

dR^ishyasyAgrahaNaM kathaM nu ghaTate dehAtmanA tiShThato bAhyArthAnubhavaprasaktamanasastattatkriyAM kurvataH . sannyastAkhiladharmakarmaviShayairnityAtmaniShThAparaiH tattvaj~naiH karaNIyamAtmani sadAnandechChubhiryatnataH

suddha.text: chittasya shud.hdhaye karma na tu vastUpalabdhaye . vastusid.hdhirvichAreNa na ki~nchitkarmakoTibhiH
shud.hdhAdvayabrahmavibodhanAshyA sarpabhramo rajjuvivekato yathA . rajastamaHsattvamiti prasid.hdhA guNAstadIyAH prathitaiH svakAryaiH
sattvaM vishud.hdhaM jalavattathApi tAbhyAM militvA saraNAya kalpate . yatrAtmabimbaH pratibimbitaH san.h prakAshayatyarka ivAkhilaM jaDam
vishud.hdhasattvasya guNAH prasAdaH svAtmAnubhUtiH paramA prashAntiH . tR^iptiH praharShaH paramAtmaniShThA yayA sadAnandarasaM samR^ichChati
prakR^itivikR^itibhinnaH shud.hdhabodhasvabhAvaH sadasadidamasheShaM bhAsayannirvisheShaH . vilasati paramAtmA jAgradAdiShvavasthA\- svahamahamiti sAkShAtsAkShirUpeNa bud.hdheH
shrutipramANaikamateH svadharma niShThA tayaivAtmavishud.hdhirasya . vishud.hdhabud.hdheH paramAtmavedanaM tenaiva sa.nsArasamUlanAshaH
tachChaivAlApanaye samyak salilaM pratIyate shud.hdham . tR^iShNAsantApaharaM sadyaH saukhyapradaM paraM puMsaH
pa~nchAnAmapi koshAnAmapavAde vibhAtyayaM shud.hdhaH . nityAnandaikarasaH pratyagrUpaH paraH svaya~njyotiH
deho.ayamannabhavano.annamayastu kosha\- shchAnnena jIvati vinashyati tadvihInaH . hyannena tvak.hcharmamA.nsarudhirAsthipurISharAshi\- rnAyaM svayaM bhavitumarhati nityashud.hdhaH
tasmAnmanaH kAraNamasya jantoH bandhasya mokShasya cha vA vidhAne . bandhasya heturmalinaM rajoguNaiH mokShasya shud.hdhaM virajastamaskam

citta.text: chittasya shud.hdhaye karma na tu vastUpalabdhaye . vastusid.hdhirvichAreNa na ki~nchitkarmakoTibhiH
sarvadA sthApanaM bud.hdheH shud.hdhe brahmaNi sarvadA . samyagAsthApanaM tatsamAdhAnamityuktaM na tu chittasya lAlanam
vidvAn sa tasmA upasattimIyuShe mumukShave sAdhu yathoktakAriNe . prashAntachittAya shamAnvitAya tattvopadeshaM kR^ipayaiva kuryAt
shabdajAlaM mahAraNyaM chittabhramaNakAraNam . ataH prayatnAjj~nAtavyaM tattvaj~naistattvamAtmanaH .. 60.. tattvaj~nAttattva
nigadyate.antaHkaraNaM manodhIH aha~NkR^itishchittamiti svavR^ittibhiH . manastu sa~NkalpavikalpanAdibhiH bud.hdhiH padArthAdhyavasAyadharmataH
lakShyachyutaM chedyadi chittamIShad.h bahirmukhaM sannipatettatastataH . pramAdataH prachyutakelikandukaH sopAnapa~N.hktau patito yathA tathA

ekAntasthitirindriyoparamaNe heturdamashchetasaH saMrodhe karaNaM shamena vilayaM yAyAdahaMvAsanA . tenAnandarasAnubhUtirachalA brAhmI sadA yoginaH tasmAchchittanirodha eva satataM kAryaH prayatno muneH .. 368.. prayatnAnmuneH
samAhitAyAM sati chittavR^ittau parAtmani brahmaNi nirvikalpe . na dR^ishyate kashchidayaM vikalpaH prajalpamAtraH parishiShyate yataH .. 398.. tataH
chittamUlo vikalpo.ayaM chittAbhAve na kashchana . atashchittaM samAdhehi pratyagrUpe parAtmani

vastu.text: chittasya shud.hdhaye karma na tu vastUpalabdhaye . vastusid.hdhirvichAreNa na ki~nchitkarmakoTibhiH
ato vichAraH kartavyo jij~nAsorAtmavastunaH .. samAsAdya dayAsindhuM guruM brahmaviduttamam
Adau nityAnityavastuvivekaH parigaNyate . ihAmutraphalabhogavirAgastadanantaram . shamAdiShaT.hkasampattirmumukShutvamiti sphuTam
brahma satyaM jaganmithyetyevaMrUpo vinishchayaH . so.ayaM nityAnityavastuvivekaH samudAhR^itaH
tadvairAgyaM jihAsA yA darshanashravaNAdibhiH . jugupsA yA dehAdibrahmaparyante hyanitye bhogavastuni .. 21.. bhogyavastuni
shAstrasya guruvAkyasya satyabud.hdhyavadhAraNam . satyabud.hdhyAvadhAraNA sA shrad.hdhA kathitA sad.hbhiryayA vastUpalabhyate
vastusvarUpaM sphuTabodhachakShuShA svenaiva vedyaM na tu paNDitena . chandrasvarUpaM nijachakShuShaiva j~nAtavyamanyairavagamyate kim
mokShasya hetuH prathamo nigadyate vairAgyamatyantamanityavastuShu . tataH shamashchApi damastitikShA nyAsaH prasaktAkhilakarmaNAM bhR^isham
j~nAnendriyANi cha manashcha manomayaH syAt.h kosho mamAhamiti vastuvikalpahetuH . saMj~nAdibhedakalanAkalito balIyAM\- statpUrvakoshamabhipUrya vijR^imbhate yaH .. 167.. anupUrya
suShuptikAle manasi pralIne naivAsti ki~nchitsakalaprasid.hdheH . ato manaHkalpita eva puMsaH sa.nsAra etasya na vastuto.asti

adhara.text: shAstrasya guruvAkyasya satyabud.hdhyavadhAraNam . satyabud.hdhyAvadhAraNA sA shrad.hdhA kathitA sad.hbhiryayA vastUpalabhyate
yad.hbod.hdhavyaM tavedAnImAtmAnAtmavivechanam . taduchyate mayA samyak shrutvAtmanyavadhAraya
pa~nchendriyaiH pa~nchabhireva hotR^ibhiH prachIyamAno viShayAjyadhArayA . jAjvalyamAno bahuvAsanendhanaiH manomayAgnirdahati prapa~ncham .. 168.. manomayo.agnirdahati
antarbahiH svaM sthiraja~NgameShu j~nAtvA.a.atmanAdhAratayA vilokya . j~nAnAtman tyaktAkhilopAdhirakhaNDarUpaH pUrNAtmanA yaH sthita eSha muktaH
sarvAdhAraM sarvavastuprakAshaM sarvAkAraM sarvagaM sarvashUnyam . nityaM shud.hdhaM nishchalaM nirvikalpaM brahmAdvaitaM yattadevAhamasmi

visesatah.text: adhikAriNamAshAste phalasid.hdhirvisheShataH . upAyA deshakAlAdyAH santyasminsahakAriNaH .. 14.. santyasyAM

adhikari.text: adhikAriNamAshAste phalasid.hdhirvisheShataH . upAyA deshakAlAdyAH santyasminsahakAriNaH .. 14.. santyasyAM

adhika.text: adhikAriNamAshAste phalasid.hdhirvisheShataH . upAyA deshakAlAdyAH santyasminsahakAriNaH .. 14.. santyasyAM

atasmi.nstad.hbud.hdhiH prabhavati vimUDhasya tamasA vivekAbhAvAdvai sphurati bhujage rajjudhiShaNA . tato.anarthavrAto nipatati samAdAturadhikaH tato yo.asad.hgrAhaH sa hi bhavati bandhaH shR^iNu sakhe
naivAyamAnandamayaH parAtmA sopAdhikatvAtprakR^itervikArAt . kAryatvahetoH sukR^itakriyAyA vikArasa~NghAtasamAhitatvAt
tayorvirodho.ayamupAdhikalpito na vAstavaH kashchidupAdhireShaH . Ishasya mAyA mahadAdikAraNaM jIvasya kAryaM shR^iNu pa~nchakosham .. 243.. pa~nchakoshAH
bAhyAnusandhiH parivardhayetphalaM durvAsanAmeva tatastato.adhikAm . j~nAtvA vivekaiH parihR^itya bAhyaM svAtmAnusandhiM vidadhIta nityam
chalatyupAdhau pratibimbalaulya\- maupAdhikaM mUDhadhiyo nayanti . svabimbabhUtaM ravivadviniShkriyaM kartAsmi bhoktAsmi hato.asmi heti
praj~nAnaghana ityAtmalakShaNaM satyasUchakam . anUdyaupAdhikasyaiva kathayanti vinAshanam

sakala.text: adhikAriNamAshAste phalasid.hdhirvisheShataH . upAyA deshakAlAdyAH santyasminsahakAriNaH .. 14.. santyasyAM
karmendriyaiH pa~nchabhira~nchito.ayaM prANo bhavetprANamayastu koshaH .. yenAtmavAnannamayo.anupUrNaH pravartate.asau sakalakriyAsu
na hyastyavidyA manaso.atiriktA mano hyavidyA bhavabandhahetuH . tasminvinaShTe sakalaM vinaShTaM vijR^imbhite.asminsakalaM vijR^imbhate
suShuptikAle manasi pralIne naivAsti ki~nchitsakalaprasid.hdheH . ato manaHkalpita eva puMsaH sa.nsAra etasya na vastuto.asti
yadidaM sakalaM vishvaM nAnArUpaM pratItamaj~nAnAt . tatsarvaM brahmaiva pratyastAsheShabhAvanAdoSham
sad.hbrahmakAryaM sakalaM sadevaM tanmAtrametanna tato.anyadasti . sanmAtrametanna astIti yo vakti na tasya moho vinirgato nidritavatprajalpaH

mR^itkAryaM sakalaM ghaTAdi satataM mR^inmAtramevAhitaM tadvatsajjanitaM sadAtmakamidaM sanmAtramevAkhilam . yasmAnnAsti sataH paraM kimapi tatsatyaM sa AtmA svayaM tasmAttattvamasi prashAntamamalaM brahmAdvayaM yatparam

nidrAkalpitadeshakAlaviShayaj~nAtrAdi sarvaM yathA mithyA tadvadihApi jAgrati jagatsvAj~nAnakAryatvataH . yasmAdevamidaM sharIrakaraNaprANAhamAdyapyasat.h tasmAttattvamasi prashAntamamalaM brahmAdvayaM yatparam
jAtinItikulagotradUragaM nAmarUpaguNadoShavarjitam . deshakAlaviShayAtivarti yad.h brahma tattvamasi bhAvayAtmani

namas.text: adhikAriNamAshAste phalasid.hdhirvisheShataH . upAyA deshakAlAdyAH santyasminsahakAriNaH .. 14.. santyasyAM
svAminnamaste natalokabandho kAruNyasindho patitaM bhavAbdhau . mAmud.hdharAtmIyakaTAkShadR^iShTyA R^ijvyAtikAruNyasudhAbhivR^iShTyA
mu~njAdiShIkAmiva dR^ishyavargAt.h pratya~nchamAtmAnamasa~Ngamakriyam . vivichya tatra pravilApya sarvaM tadAtmanA tiShThati yaH sa muktaH
dehAtmadhIreva nR^iNAmasad.hdhiyAM janmAdiduHkhaprabhavasya bIjam . yatastatastvaM jahi tAM prayatnAt.h tyakte tu chitte na punarbhavAshA
tasmAnmanaH kAraNamasya jantoH bandhasya mokShasya cha vA vidhAne . bandhasya heturmalinaM rajoguNaiH mokShasya shud.hdhaM virajastamaskam
eSha svaya~njyotirasheShasAkShI vij~nAnakosho vilasatyajasram . vij~nAnakoshe lakShyaM vidhAyainamasadvilakShaNa\- makhaNDavR^ittyA.a.atmatayA.anubhAvaya
namo namaste gurave mahAtmane vimuktasa~NgAya saduttamAya . nityAdvayAnandarasasvarUpiNe bhUmne sadA.apAradayAmbudhAmne
svArAjyasAmrAjyavibhUtireShA bhavatkR^ipAshrImahimaprasAdAt . prAptA mayA shrIgurave mahAtmane namo namaste.astu punarnamo.astu
namastasmai sadaikasmai kasmaichinmahase namaH . sadekasmai namashchinmahase muhuH yadetadvishvarUpeNa rAjate gururAja te

kala.text: adhikAriNamAshAste phalasid.hdhirvisheShataH . upAyA deshakAlAdyAH santyasminsahakAriNaH .. 14.. santyasyAM

brahmAnandarasAnubhUtikalitaiH pUtaiH sushItairyutai\- ryuShmadvAkkalashojjhitaiH shrutisukhairvAkyAmR^itaiH sechaya . santaptaM bhavatApadAvadahanajvAlAbhirenaM prabho dhanyAste bhavadIkShaNakShaNagateH pAtrIkR^itAH svIkR^itAH

praj~nAvAnapi paNDito.api chaturo.apyatyantasUkShmAtmadR^ig.h\- vyAlIDhastamasA na vetti bahudhA sambodhito.api sphuTam . bhrAntyAropitameva sAdhu kalayatyAlambate tad.hguNAn.h hantAsau prabalA durantatamasaH shaktirmahatyAvR^itiH
tirobhUte svAtmanyamalataratejovati pumAn.h anAtmAnaM mohAdahamiti sharIraM kalayati . tataH kAmakrodhaprabhR^itibhiramuM bandhanaguNaiH paraM vikShepAkhyA rajasa urushaktirvyathayati
karmendriyaiH pa~nchabhira~nchito.ayaM prANo bhavetprANamayastu koshaH .. yenAtmavAnannamayo.anupUrNaH pravartate.asau sakalakriyAsu
j~nAnendriyANi cha manashcha manomayaH syAt.h kosho mamAhamiti vastuvikalpahetuH . saMj~nAdibhedakalanAkalito balIyAM\- statpUrvakoshamabhipUrya vijR^imbhate yaH .. 167.. anupUrya
na hyastyavidyA manaso.atiriktA mano hyavidyA bhavabandhahetuH . tasminvinaShTe sakalaM vinaShTaM vijR^imbhite.asminsakalaM vijR^imbhate
suShuptikAle manasi pralIne naivAsti ki~nchitsakalaprasid.hdheH . ato manaHkalpita eva puMsaH sa.nsAra etasya na vastuto.asti
yadidaM sakalaM vishvaM nAnArUpaM pratItamaj~nAnAt . tatsarvaM brahmaiva pratyastAsheShabhAvanAdoSham

nama.text: adhikAriNamAshAste phalasid.hdhirvisheShataH . upAyA deshakAlAdyAH santyasminsahakAriNaH .. 14.. santyasyAM
sahanaM sarvaduHkhAnAmapratIkArapUrvakam . chintAvilAparahitaM sA titikShA nigadyate
etayormandatA yatra viraktatvamumukShayoH . marau salilavattatra shamAderbhAnamAtratA
shrotriyo.avR^ijino.akAmahato yo brahmavittamaH . brahmaNyuparataH shAnto nirindhana ivAnalaH . ahetukadayAsindhurbandhurAnamatAM satAm
svAminnamaste natalokabandho kAruNyasindho patitaM bhavAbdhau . mAmud.hdharAtmIyakaTAkShadR^iShTyA R^ijvyAtikAruNyasudhAbhivR^iShTyA
ko nAma bandhaH kathameSha AgataH kathaM pratiShThAsya kathaM vimokShaH . ko.asAvanAtmA paramaH ka AtmA tayorvivekaH kathametaduchyatAm
vINAyA rUpasaundaryaM tantrIvAdanasauShThavam . prajAra~njanamAtraM tanna sAmrAjyAya kalpate
mokShasya hetuH prathamo nigadyate vairAgyamatyantamanityavastuShu . tataH shamashchApi damastitikShA nyAsaH prasaktAkhilakarmaNAM bhR^isham
pa~nchIkR^itebhyo bhUtebhyaH sthUlebhyaH pUrvakarmaNA . samutpannamidaM sthUlaM bhogAyatanamAtmanaH . avasthA jAgarastasya sthUlArthAnubhavo yataH
viShayANAmAnukUlye sukhI duHkhI viparyaye . sukhaM duHkhaM cha tad.hdharmaH sadAnandasya nAtmanaH

sesa.text: adhikAriNamAshAste phalasid.hdhirvisheShataH . upAyA deshakAlAdyAH santyasminsahakAriNaH .. 14.. santyasyAM
sthUlasya sambhavajarAmaraNAni dharmAH sthaulyAdayo bahuvidhAH shishutAdyavasthAH . varNAshramAdiniyamA bahudhA.a.amayAH syuH pUjAvamAnabahumAnamukhA visheShAH

kartrAdibhAvaM pratipadya rAjate yatra svayaM bhAti hyayaM parAtmA . svaya~njyotirayaM dhImAtrakopAdhirasheShasAkShI na lipyate tatkR^itakarmaleshaiH . karmalepaiH yasmAdasa~Ngastata eva karmabhiH na lipyate ki~nchidupAdhinA kR^itaiH
prakR^itivikR^itibhinnaH shud.hdhabodhasvabhAvaH sadasadidamasheShaM bhAsayannirvisheShaH . vilasati paramAtmA jAgradAdiShvavasthA\- svahamahamiti sAkShAtsAkShirUpeNa bud.hdheH
svapne.arthashUnye sR^ijati svashaktyA bhoktrAdivishvaM mana eva sarvam . tathaiva jAgratyapi no visheShaH tatsarvametanmanaso vijR^imbhaNam
manaH prasUte viShayAnasheShAn.h sthUlAtmanA sUkShmatayA cha bhoktuH . sharIravarNAshramajAtibhedAn.h guNakriyAhetuphalAni nityam
yadidaM sakalaM vishvaM nAnArUpaM pratItamaj~nAnAt . tatsarvaM brahmaiva pratyastAsheShabhAvanAdoSham
yathA yathA pratyagavasthitaM manaH tathA tathA mu~nchati bAhyavAsanAm . bAhyavAsanAH niHsheShamokShe sati vAsanAnAM AtmAnubhUtiH pratibandhashUnyA
ahambhAvasya dehe.asminniHsheShavilayAvadhi . sAvadhAnena yuktAtmA svAdhyAsApanayaM kuru
yo vA pure so.ahamiti pratIto bud.hdhyA praklR^iptastamasA.atimUDhayA . bud.hdhyA.aviviktastamasA tasyaiva niHsheShatayA vinAshe brahmAtmabhAvaH pratibandhashUnyaH

vicarah.text: ato vichAraH kartavyo jij~nAsorAtmavastunaH .. samAsAdya dayAsindhuM guruM brahmaviduttamam

uttama.text: ato vichAraH kartavyo jij~nAsorAtmavastunaH .. samAsAdya dayAsindhuM guruM brahmaviduttamam
viShayebhyaH parAvartya sthApanaM svasvagolake . ubhayeShAmindriyANAM sa damaH parikIrtitaH . bAhyAnAlambanaM vR^ittereShoparatiruttamA
namo namaste gurave mahAtmane vimuktasa~NgAya saduttamAya . nityAdvayAnandarasasvarUpiNe bhUmne sadA.apAradayAmbudhAmne
lakShyAlakShyagatiM tyaktvA yastiShThetkevalAtmanA . shiva eva svayaM sAkShAdayaM brahmaviduttamaH

carah.text: ato vichAraH kartavyo jij~nAsorAtmavastunaH .. samAsAdya dayAsindhuM guruM brahmaviduttamam
samAdhAtuM bAhyadR^iShTyA prArabdhaM vadati shrutiH . na tu dehAdisatyatvabodhanAya vipashchitAm . yataH shruterabhiprAyaH paramArthaikagocharaH

karta.text: ato vichAraH kartavyo jij~nAsorAtmavastunaH .. samAsAdya dayAsindhuM guruM brahmaviduttamam
R^iNamochanakartAraH pituH santi sutAdayaH . bandhamochanakartA tu svasmAdanyo na kashchana
tasmAtsarvaprayatnena bhavabandhavimuktaye . svaireva yatnaH kartavyo rogAdAviva paNDitaiH .. 66.. rogAderiva
aha~NkAraH sa vij~neyaH kartA bhoktAbhimAnyayam . sattvAdiguNayogena chAvasthAtrayamashnute .. 104.. yogenAvasthAtritayamshnute
AtmAnAtmavivekaH kartavyo bandhamuktaye viduShA . tenaivAnandI bhavati svaM vij~nAya sachchidAnandam
yo.ayaM vij~nAnamayaH prANeShu hR^idi sphuratyayaM jyotiH . sphuratsvaya~njyotiH kUTasthaH sannAtmA kartA bhoktA bhavatyupAdhisthaH
tadAtmAnAtmanoH samyagvivekenaiva sidhyati . tato vivekaH kartavyaH pratyagAtmasadAtmanoH .. 203.. pratyagAtmAsadAtmanoH

j~nAte vastunyapi balavatI vAsanA.anAdireShA kartA bhoktApyahamiti dR^iDhA yA.asya sa.nsArahetuH . pratyag.hdR^iShTyA.a.atmani nivasatA sApaneyA prayatnA\- nmuktiM prAhustadiha munayo vAsanAtAnavaM yat
aha~NkAre kartaryahamiti matiM mu~ncha sahasA vikArAtmanyAtmapratiphalajuShi svasthitimuShi . yadadhyAsAtprAptA janimR^itijarAduHkhabahulA pratIchashchinmUrtestava sukhatanoH sa.nsR^itiriyam
pramAdo brahmaniShThAyAM na kartavyaH kadAchana . pramAdo mR^ityurityAha bhagavAnbrahmaNaH sutaH

arta.text: ato vichAraH kartavyo jij~nAsorAtmavastunaH .. samAsAdya dayAsindhuM guruM brahmaviduttamam
R^iNamochanakartAraH pituH santi sutAdayaH . bandhamochanakartA tu svasmAdanyo na kashchana

yasya sannidhimAtreNa dehendriyamanodhiyaH . viShayeShu svakIyeShu vartante preritA iva
j~nAtA mano.aha~NkR^itivikriyANAM dehendriyaprANakR^itakriyANAm . ayo.agnivattAnanuvartamAno na cheShTate no vikaroti ki~nchana
AtmAnAtmavivekaH kartavyo bandhamuktaye viduShA . tenaivAnandI bhavati svaM vij~nAya sachchidAnandam
dehendriyAdAvasati bhramoditAM vidvAnahantAM na jahAti yAvat . tAvanna tasyAsti vimuktivArtA\- pyastveSha vedAntanayAntadarshI
karmendriyaiH pa~nchabhira~nchito.ayaM prANo bhavetprANamayastu koshaH .. yenAtmavAnannamayo.anupUrNaH pravartate.asau sakalakriyAsu

daya.text: ato vichAraH kartavyo jij~nAsorAtmavastunaH .. samAsAdya dayAsindhuM guruM brahmaviduttamam
vairAgyaM cha mumukShutvaM tIvraM yasya tu vidyate . tasminnevArthavantaH syuH phalavantaH shamAdayaH
shrotriyo.avR^ijino.akAmahato yo brahmavittamaH . brahmaNyuparataH shAnto nirindhana ivAnalaH . ahetukadayAsindhurbandhurAnamatAM satAm
R^iNamochanakartAraH pituH santi sutAdayaH . bandhamochanakartA tu svasmAdanyo na kashchana
parasparAMshairmilitAni bhUtvA sthUlAni cha sthUlasharIrahetavaH . mAtrAstadIyA viShayA bhavanti shabdAdayaH pa~ncha sukhAya bhoktuH
mokShasya kA~NkShA yadi vai tavAsti tyajAtidUrAdviShayAnviShaM yathA . pIyUShavattoShadayAkShamArjava\- prashAntidAntIrbhaja nityamAdarAt
dehendriyaprANamano.ahamAdayaH sarve vikArA viShayAH sukhAdayaH . vyomAdibhUtAnyakhilaM cha vishvaM avyaktaparyantamidaM hyanAtmA
aha~NkArAdidehAntA viShayAshcha sukhAdayaH . vedyante ghaTavadyena nityabodhasvarUpiNA
shalyarAshirmAMsalipto malapUrNo.atikashmalaH . kathaM bhavedayaM vettA svayametadvilakShaNaH

AnandapratibimbachumbitatanurvR^ittistamojR^imbhitA syAdAnandamayaH priyAdiguNakaH sveShTArthalAbhodayaH . puNyasyAnubhave vibhAti kR^itinAmAnandarUpaH svayaM sarvo nandati yatra sAdhu tanubhR^inmAtraH prayatnaM vinA .. 207.. bhUtvA nandati

laksana.text: shalyarAshirmAMsalipto malapUrNo.atikashmalaH . kathaM bhavedayaM vettA svayametadvilakShaNaH
tva~N.hmA.nsamedo.asthipurISharAshA\- vahammatiM mUDhajanaH karoti . vilakShaNaM vetti vichArashIlo nijasvarUpaM paramArthabhUtam
bud.hdhirbud.hdhIndriyaiH sArdhaM savR^ittiH kartR^ilakShaNaH . vij~nAnamayakoshaH syAtpuMsaH sa.nsArakAraNam
jIvatvaM na tato.anyastu svarUpeNa vilakShaNaH . tato.anyattu sambandhastvAtmano bud.hdhyA mithyAj~nAnapuraHsaraH .. 201.. sambandhaH svAtmano
yo.ayamAtmA svaya~njyotiH pa~nchakoshavilakShaNaH . avasthAtrayasAkShI sannirvikAro nira~njanaH . sadAnandaH sa vij~neyaH svAtmatvena vipashchitA
dehaM dhiyaM chitpratibimbamevaM visR^ijya bud.hdhau nihitaM guhAyAm . draShTAramAtmAnamakhaNDabodhaM sarvaprakAshaM sadasadvilakShaNam
tatastu tau lakShaNayA sulakShyau tayorakhaNDaikarasatvasid.hdhaye . nAlaM jahatyA na tathA.ajahatyA kintUbhayArthAtmikayaiva bhAvyam .. 247.. bhayArthaikatayaiva
bhrAntikalpitajagatkalAshrayaM svAshrayaM cha sadasadvilakShaNam . niShkalaM nirupamAnavad.hdhi yad.h brahma tattvamasi bhAvayAtmani

laksita.text: tattvampadAbhyAmabhidhIyamAnayoH brahmAtmanoH shodhitayoryadIttham . shodhitayoryadittham shrutyA tayostattvamasIti samyag.h ekatvameva pratipAdyate muhuH .. 241 ekyaM tayorlakShitayorna vAchyayoH nigadyate.anyonyavirud.hdhadharmiNoH . khadyotabhAnvoriva rAjabhR^ityayoH kUpAmburAshyoH paramANumervoH

shrIguruvAcha . dhanyo.asi kR^itakR^ityo.asi pAvitaM te kulaM tvayA . pAvitaM yadavidyAbandhamuktyA brahmIbhavitumichChasi
anukShaNaM yatparihR^itya kR^ityaM anAdyavidyAkR^itabandhamokShaNam . dehaH parArtho.ayamamuShya poShaNe yaH sajjate sa svamanena hanti
vAgAdi pa~ncha shravaNAdi pa~ncha prANAdi pa~nchAbhramukhAni pa~ncha . bud.hdhyAdyavidyApi cha kAmakarmaNI puryaShTakaM sUkShmasharIramAhuH
avyaktanAmnI parameshashaktiH anAdyavidyA triguNAtmikA parA . kAryAnumeyA sudhiyaiva mAyA yayA jagatsarvamidaM prasUyate
na hyastyavidyA manaso.atiriktA mano hyavidyA bhavabandhahetuH . tasminvinaShTe sakalaM vinaShTaM vijR^imbhite.asminsakalaM vijR^imbhate
ataH prAhurmano.avidyAM paNDitAstattvadarshinaH . yenaiva bhrAmyate vishvaM vAyunevAbhramaNDalam
anAditvamavidyAyAH kAryasyApi tatheShyate . utpannAyAM tu vidyAyAmAvidyakamanAdyapi

karya.text: aj~nAnayogAtparamAtmanastava hyanAtmabandhastata eva sa.nsR^itiH . tayorvivekoditabodhavahniH aj~nAnakAryaM pradahetsamUlam

AptoktiM khananaM tathoparishilAdyutkarShaNaM svIkR^itiM nikShepaH samapekShate na hi bahiHshabdaistu nirgachChati . tadvad.hbrahmavidopadeshamananadhyAnAdibhirlabhyate mAyAkAryatirohitaM svamamalaM tattvaM na duryuktibhiH
avyaktanAmnI parameshashaktiH anAdyavidyA triguNAtmikA parA . kAryAnumeyA sudhiyaiva mAyA yayA jagatsarvamidaM prasUyate
shud.hdhAdvayabrahmavibodhanAshyA sarpabhramo rajjuvivekato yathA . rajastamaHsattvamiti prasid.hdhA guNAstadIyAH prathitaiH svakAryaiH
mAyA mAyAkAryaM sarvaM mahadAdidehaparyantam . asadidamanAtmatattvaM vid.hdhi tvaM marumarIchikAkalpam
tanmanaHshodhanaM kAryaM prayatnena mumukShuNA . vishud.hdhe sati chaitasminmuktiH karaphalAyate
anAditvamavidyAyAH kAryasyApi tatheShyate . utpannAyAM tu vidyAyAmAvidyakamanAdyapi
naivAyamAnandamayaH parAtmA sopAdhikatvAtprakR^itervikArAt . kAryatvahetoH sukR^itakriyAyA vikArasa~NghAtasamAhitatvAt
mR^itkAryabhUto.api mR^ido na bhinnaH kumbho.asti sarvatra tu mR^itsvarUpAt . na kumbharUpaM pR^ithagasti kumbhaH kuto mR^iShA kalpitanAmamAtraH

anukShaNaM yatparihR^itya kR^ityaM anAdyavidyAkR^itabandhamokShaNam . dehaH parArtho.ayamamuShya poShaNe yaH sajjate sa svamanena hanti

sita.text: brahmAnandarasAnubhUtikalitaiH pUtaiH sushItairyutai\- ryuShmadvAkkalashojjhitaiH shrutisukhairvAkyAmR^itaiH sechaya . santaptaM bhavatApadAvadahanajvAlAbhirenaM prabho dhanyAste bhavadIkShaNakShaNagateH pAtrIkR^itAH svIkR^itAH
eSho.antarAtmA puruShaH purANo nirantarAkhaNDasukhAnubhUtiH . sadaikarUpaH pratibodhamAtro yeneShitA vAgasavashcharanti
mahAmohagrAhagrasanagalitAtmAvagamano dhiyo nAnAvasthAM svayamabhinayaMstad.hguNatayA . nAnAvasthAH apAre sa.nsAre viShayaviShapUre jalanidhau nimajyonmajyAyaM bhramati kumatiH kutsitagatiH

tattvampadAbhyAmabhidhIyamAnayoH brahmAtmanoH shodhitayoryadIttham . shodhitayoryadittham shrutyA tayostattvamasIti samyag.h ekatvameva pratipAdyate muhuH .. 241 ekyaM tayorlakShitayorna vAchyayoH nigadyate.anyonyavirud.hdhadharmiNoH . khadyotabhAnvoriva rAjabhR^ityayoH kUpAmburAshyoH paramANumervoH
yadA kadA vApi vipashchideSha brahmaNyanante.apyaNumAtrabhedam . pashyatyathAmuShya bhayaM tadaiva yadvIkShitaM bhinnatayA pramAdAt .. 330.. yadIkShitaM
nityAdvayAkhaNDachidekarUpo bud.hdhyAdisAkShI sadasadvilakShaNaH . ahampadapratyayalakShitArthaH pratyak sadAnandaghanaH parAtmA
ananyatvamadhiShThAnAdAropyasya nirIkShitam . paNDitai rajjusarpAdau vikalpo bhrAntijIvanaH
dR^iShTaduHkheShvanudvego vidyAyAH prastutaM phalam . yatkR^itaM bhrAntivelAyAM nAnA karma jugupsitam . pashchAnnaro vivekena tatkathaM kartumarhati

jijnasa.text: vivekino viraktasya shamAdiguNashAlinaH . mumukShoreva hi brahmajij~nAsAyogyatA matA

virakta.text: vivekino viraktasya shamAdiguNashAlinaH . mumukShoreva hi brahmajij~nAsAyogyatA matA
etayormandatA yatra viraktatvamumukShayoH . marau salilavattatra shamAderbhAnamAtratA
antastyAgo bahistyAgo viraktasyaiva yujyate . tyajatyantarbahiHsa~NgaM viraktastu mumukShayA
bahistu viShayaiH sa~NgaM tathAntarahamAdibhiH . sa~NgaH virakta eva shaknoti tyaktuM brahmaNi niShThitaH

jnata.text: vivekino viraktasya shamAdiguNashAlinaH . mumukShoreva hi brahmajij~nAsAyogyatA matA
tamArAdhya guruM bhaktyA prahvaprashrayasevanaiH . prahvaH prasannaM tamanuprApya pR^ichChejj~nAtavyamAtmanaH
vastusvarUpaM sphuTabodhachakShuShA svenaiva vedyaM na tu paNDitena . chandrasvarUpaM nijachakShuShaiva j~nAtavyamanyairavagamyate kim
shabdajAlaM mahAraNyaM chittabhramaNakAraNam . ataH prayatnAjj~nAtavyaM tattvaj~naistattvamAtmanaH .. 60.. tattvaj~nAttattva
yastvayAdya kR^itaH prashno varIyA~nChAstravinmataH . sammataH sUtraprAyo nigUDhArtho j~nAtavyashcha mumukShubhiH
j~nAtA mano.aha~NkR^itivikriyANAM dehendriyaprANakR^itakriyANAm . ayo.agnivattAnanuvartamAno na cheShTate no vikaroti ki~nchana
brahmabhUtastu sa.nsR^ityai vidvAnnAvartate punaH . vij~nAtavyamataH samyagbrahmAbhinnatvamAtmanaH
etattritayaM dR^iShTaM samyagrajjusvarUpavij~nAnAt . tasmAdvastusatattvaM j~nAtavyaM bandhamuktaye viduShA
atIva sUkShmaM paramAtmatattvaM na sthUladR^iShTyA pratipattumarhati . samAdhinAtyantasusUkShmavR^ittyA j~nAtavyamAryairatishud.hdhabud.hdhibhiH
vij~nAta Atmano yasya brahmabhAvaH shruterbalAt . bhavabandhavinirmuktaH sa jIvanmuktalakShaNaH .. 437.. sa jIvanmukta iShyate

svapno bhavatyasya vibhaktyavasthA svamAtrasheSheNa vibhAti yatra . svapne tu bud.hdhiH svayameva jAgrat.h kAlInanAnAvidhavAsanAbhiH
avyaktametattriguNairniruktaM tatkAraNaM nAma sharIramAtmanaH . suShuptiretasya vibhaktyavasthA pralInasarvendriyabud.hdhivR^ittiH
tasmAnmanaH kAraNamasya jantoH bandhasya mokShasya cha vA vidhAne . bandhasya heturmalinaM rajoguNaiH mokShasya shud.hdhaM virajastamaskam
yAvad.hbhrAntistAvadevAsya sattA mithyAj~nAnojjR^imbhitasya pramAdAt . rajjvAM sarpo bhrAntikAlIna eva bhrAnternAshe naiva sarpo.api tadvat .. 197.. sarpo.asti
sadvAsanAsphUrtivijR^imbhaNe sati hyasau vilInApyahamAdivAsanA . vilInA tvahamAdivAsanA atiprakR^iShTApyaruNaprabhAyAM vilIyate sAdhu yathA tamisrA
tejasIva tamo yatra pralInaM bhrAntikAraNam . yatra vilInaM advitIye pare tattve nirvisheShe bhidA kutaH
prArabdhasUtragrathitaM sharIraM prayAtu vA tiShThatu goriva srak . na tatpunaH pashyati tattvavettA\- .a.anandAtmani brahmaNi lInavR^ittiH
vAsanAnudayo bhogye vairAgyasya tadAvadhiH . ahambhAvodayAbhAvo bodhasya paramAvadhiH . lInavR^ittairanutpattirmaryAdoparatestu sA .. 424.. vR^ittera
sthitapraj~no yatirayaM yaH sadAnandamashnute . brahmaNyeva vilInAtmA nirvikAro viniShkriyaH

nityaM vibhuM sarvagataM susUkShmaM antarbahiHshUnyamananyamAtmanaH . vij~nAya samya~N.hnijarUpametat.h pumAn vipApmA virajo vimR^ityuH
AkAshavannirmalanirvikalpaM niHsImaniHspandananirvikAram . antarbahiHshUnyamananyamadvayaM svayaM paraM brahma kimasti bodhyam
ananyatvamadhiShThAnAdAropyasya nirIkShitam . paNDitai rajjusarpAdau vikalpo bhrAntijIvanaH

yatra.text: sAdhanAnyatra chatvAri kathitAni manIShibhiH . yeShu satsveva sanniShThA yadabhAve na sidhyati
etayormandatA yatra viraktatvamumukShayoH . marau salilavattatra shamAderbhAnamAtratA
svapno bhavatyasya vibhaktyavasthA svamAtrasheSheNa vibhAti yatra . svapne tu bud.hdhiH svayameva jAgrat.h kAlInanAnAvidhavAsanAbhiH

kartrAdibhAvaM pratipadya rAjate yatra svayaM bhAti hyayaM parAtmA . svaya~njyotirayaM dhImAtrakopAdhirasheShasAkShI na lipyate tatkR^itakarmaleshaiH . karmalepaiH yasmAdasa~Ngastata eva karmabhiH na lipyate ki~nchidupAdhinA kR^itaiH
sattvaM vishud.hdhaM jalavattathApi tAbhyAM militvA saraNAya kalpate . yatrAtmabimbaH pratibimbitaH san.h prakAshayatyarka ivAkhilaM jaDam
mano nAma mahAvyAghro viShayAraNyabhUmiShu . charatyatra na gachChantu sAdhavo ye mumukShavaH

AnandapratibimbachumbitatanurvR^ittistamojR^imbhitA syAdAnandamayaH priyAdiguNakaH sveShTArthalAbhodayaH . puNyasyAnubhave vibhAti kR^itinAmAnandarUpaH svayaM sarvo nandati yatra sAdhu tanubhR^inmAtraH prayatnaM vinA .. 207.. bhUtvA nandati

shiShya uvAcha . mithyAtvena niShid.hdheShu kosheShveteShu pa~nchasu . sarvAbhAvaM vinA ki~nchinna pashyAmyatra he guro . vij~neyaM kimu vastvasti svAtmanA.a.atmavipashchitA .. 212.. svAtmanAtra vipashchitA
sa devadatto.ayamitIha chaikatA virud.hdhadharmA.nshamapAsya kathyate . yathA tathA tattvamasItivAkye virud.hdhadharmAnubhayatra hitvA
yatra bhrAntyA kalpitaM tadviveke tattanmAtraM naiva tasmAdvibhinnam . svapne naShTaM svapnavishvaM vichitraM svasmAdbhinnaM kinnu dR^iShTaM prabodhe

kenApi mR^id.hbhinnatayA svarUpaM ghaTasya sandarshayituM na shakyate . ato ghaTaH kalpita eva mohA\- nmR^ideva satyaM paramArthabhUtam

yadi satyaM bhavedvishvaM suShuptAvupalabhyatAm . yannopalabhyate ki~nchidato.asatsvapnavanmR^iShA
nedaM nedaM kalpitatvAnna satyaM rajjudR^iShTavyAlavatsvapnavachcha . rajjau itthaM dR^ishyaM sAdhuyuktyA vyapohya j~neyaH pashchAdekabhAvastayoryaH

ChAyAsharIre pratibimbagAtre yatsvapnadehe hR^idi kalpitA~Nge . yathAtmabud.hdhistava nAsti kAchi\- jjIvachCharIre cha tathaiva mA.astu
dehAdisarvaviShaye parikalpya rAgaM badhnAti tena puruShaM pashuvad.hguNena . vairasyamatra viShavat suvidhAya pashchAd.h enaM vimochayati tanmana eva bandhAt
mayyakhaNDasukhAmbhodhau bahudhA vishvavIchayaH . utpadyante vilIyante mAyAmArutavibhramAt
ChAyayA spR^iShTamuShNaM vA shItaM vA suShThu duHShThu vA . na spR^ishatyeva yatki~nchitpuruShaM tadvilakShaNam
gachCha.nstiShThannupavisha~nChayAno vA.anyathApi vA . yathechChayA vasedvidvAnAtmArAmaH sadA muniH
vimAnamAlambya sharIrametad.h bhunaktyasheShAnviShayAnupasthitAn . parechChayA bAlavadAtmavettA yo.avyaktali~Ngo.ananuShaktabAhyaH

evam.text: brahma satyaM jaganmithyetyevaMrUpo vinishchayaH . so.ayaM nityAnityavastuvivekaH samudAhR^itaH
bAhyendriyaiH sthUlapadArthasevAM srak.hchandanastryAdivichitrarUpAm . karoti jIvaH svayametadAtmanA tasmAtprashastirvapuSho.asya jAgare
dehaM dhiyaM chitpratibimbamevaM visR^ijya bud.hdhau nihitaM guhAyAm . draShTAramAtmAnamakhaNDabodhaM sarvaprakAshaM sadasadvilakShaNam
sad.hbrahmakAryaM sakalaM sadevaM tanmAtrametanna tato.anyadasti . sanmAtrametanna astIti yo vakti na tasya moho vinirgato nidritavatprajalpaH

vAyunA.a.anIyate meghaH punastenaiva nIyate . manasA kalpyate bandho mokShastenaiva kalpyate

mokShaikasaktyA viShayeShu rAgaM nirmUlya sannyasya cha sarvakarma . sachChrad.hdhayA yaH shravaNAdiniShTho rajaHsvabhAvaM sa dhunoti bud.hdheH

duhkham.text: mastakanyastabhArAderduHkhamanyairnivAryate . kShudhAdikR^itaduHkhaM tu vinA svena na kenachit
viShayANAmAnukUlye sukhI duHkhI viparyaye . sukhaM duHkhaM cha tad.hdharmaH sadAnandasya nAtmanaH
AtmArthatvena hi preyAnviShayo na svataH priyaH . svata eva hi sarveShAmAtmA priyatamo yataH . tata AtmA sadAnando nAsya duHkhaM kadAchana

bIjaM  sa.nsR^itibhUmijasya tu tamo dehAtmadhIra~Nkuro rAgaH pallavamambu karma tu vapuH skandho.asavaH shAkhikAH . agrANIndriyasa.nhatishcha viShayAH puShpANi duHkhaM phalaM nAnAkarmasamud.hbhavaM bahuvidhaM bhoktAtra jIvaH khagaH
yatirasadanusandhiM bandhahetuM vihAya svayamayamahamasmItyAtmadR^iShTyaiva tiShThet.h sukhayati nanu niShThA brahmaNi svAnubhUtyA harati paramavidyAkAryaduHkhaM pratItam
sthUlAdisambandhavato.abhimAninaH sukhaM cha duHkhaM cha shubhAshubhe cha . vidhvastabandhasya sadAtmano muneH kutaH shubhaM vA.apyashubhaM phalaM vA

svarupam.text: vastusvarUpaM sphuTabodhachakShuShA svenaiva vedyaM na tu paNDitena . chandrasvarUpaM nijachakShuShaiva j~nAtavyamanyairavagamyate kim
atha te sampravakShyAmi svarUpaM paramAtmanaH . yadvij~nAya naro bandhAnmuktaH kaivalyamashnute
tva~N.hmA.nsamedo.asthipurISharAshA\- vahammatiM mUDhajanaH karoti . vilakShaNaM vetti vichArashIlo nijasvarUpaM paramArthabhUtam
kenApi mR^id.hbhinnatayA svarUpaM ghaTasya sandarshayituM na shakyate . ato ghaTaH kalpita eva mohA\- nmR^ideva satyaM paramArthabhUtam
ataH paraM brahma sadadvitIyaM vishud.hdhavij~nAnaghanaM nira~njanam . prashAntamAdyantavihInamakriyaM nirantarAnandarasasvarUpam
aha~NkAragrahAnmuktaH svarUpamupapadyate . chandravadvimalaH pUrNaH sadAnandaH svayamprabhaH
yatra bhrAntyA kalpitaM tadviveke tattanmAtraM naiva tasmAdvibhinnam . bhrAnternAshe bhAti dR^iShTAhitattvaM rajjustadvadvishvamAtmasvarUpam
ajaramamaramastAbhAvavastusvarUpaM stimitasalilarAshiprakhyamAkhyAvihInam . shamitaguNavikAraM shAshvataM shAntamekaM hR^idi kalayati vidvAn brahma pUrNaM samAdhau
anirUpya svarUpaM yanmanovAchAmagocharam . ekamevAdvayaM brahma neha nAnAsti ki~nchana
bhavAnapIdaM paratattvamAtmanaH svarUpamAnandaghanaM vichArya . nichAyya vidhUya mohaM svamanaHprakalpitaM muktaH kR^itArtho bhavatu prabud.hdhaH

avagam.text: vastusvarUpaM sphuTabodhachakShuShA svenaiva vedyaM na tu paNDitena . chandrasvarUpaM nijachakShuShaiva j~nAtavyamanyairavagamyate kim

iti guruvachanAchChrutipramANAt.h paramavagamya satattvamAtmayuktyA . prashamitakaraNaH samAhitAtmA kvachidachalAkR^itirAtmaniShThato.abhUt .. 479.. AtmaniShThito

atha te sampravakShyAmi svarUpaM paramAtmanaH . yadvij~nAya naro bandhAnmuktaH kaivalyamashnute

kenApi mR^id.hbhinnatayA svarUpaM ghaTasya sandarshayituM na shakyate . ato ghaTaH kalpita eva mohA\- nmR^ideva satyaM paramArthabhUtam

alpa.text: vINAyA rUpasaundaryaM tantrIvAdanasauShThavam . prajAra~njanamAtraM tanna sAmrAjyAya kalpate
tataH shrutistanmananaM satattva\- dhyAnaM chiraM nityanirantaraM muneH . tato.avikalpaM parametya vidvAn.h ihaiva nirvANasukhaM samR^ichChati
viShayAshAmahApAshAdyo vimuktaH sudustyajAt . sa eva kalpate muktyai nAnyaH ShaT.hshAstravedyapi
nigadyate.antaHkaraNaM manodhIH aha~NkR^itishchittamiti svavR^ittibhiH . manastu sa~NkalpavikalpanAdibhiH bud.hdhiH padArthAdhyavasAyadharmataH
sattvaM vishud.hdhaM jalavattathApi tAbhyAM militvA saraNAya kalpate . yatrAtmabimbaH pratibimbitaH san.h prakAshayatyarka ivAkhilaM jaDam
mAyA mAyAkAryaM sarvaM mahadAdidehaparyantam . asadidamanAtmatattvaM vid.hdhi tvaM marumarIchikAkalpam
j~nAnendriyANi cha manashcha manomayaH syAt.h kosho mamAhamiti vastuvikalpahetuH . saMj~nAdibhedakalanAkalito balIyAM\- statpUrvakoshamabhipUrya vijR^imbhate yaH .. 167.. anupUrya

anyatha.text: na yogena na sA~Nkhyena karmaNA no na vidyayA . brahmAtmaikatvabodhena mokShaH sidhyati nAnyathA
eShA.a.avR^itirnAma tamoguNasya shaktirmayA vastvavabhAsate.anyathA . shaktiryayA saiShA nidAnaM puruShasya sa.nsR^iteH vikShepashakteH pravaNasya hetuH .. 113.. prasarasya
shiShya uvAcha . bhrameNApyanyathA vA.astu jIvabhAvaH parAtmanaH . tadupAdheranAditvAnnAnAdernAsha iShyate
vinivR^ittirbhavettasya samyagj~nAnena nAnyathA . brahmAtmaikatvavij~nAnaM samyagj~nAnaM shrutermatam
sadaikarUpasya chidAtmano vibho\- rAnandamUrteranavadyakIrteH . naivAnyathA kvApyavikAriNaste vinAhamadhyAsamamuShya sa.nsR^itiH
tato vikArAH prakR^iterahammukhA dehAvasAnA viShayAshcha sarve . kShaNe.anyathAbhAvitayA hyamIShA\- masattvamAtmA tu kadApi nAnyathA .. 350.. masattvamAtmA tu kadApi

nirvikalpakasamAdhinA sphuTaM brahmatattvamavagamyate dhruvam . nAnyathA chalatayA manogateH pratyayAntaravimishritaM bhavet
gachCha.nstiShThannupavisha~nChayAno vA.anyathApi vA . yathechChayA vasedvidvAnAtmArAmaH sadA muniH

yo.ayamAtmA svaya~njyotiH pa~nchakoshavilakShaNaH . avasthAtrayasAkShI sannirvikAro nira~njanaH . sadAnandaH sa vij~neyaH svAtmatvena vipashchitA
ataH paraM brahma sadadvitIyaM vishud.hdhavij~nAnaghanaM nira~njanam . prashAntamAdyantavihInamakriyaM nirantarAnandarasasvarUpam
nirvikalpakamanalpamakSharaM yatkSharAkSharavilakShaNaM param . nityamavyayasukhaM nira~njanaM brahma tattvamasi bhAvayAtmani
nirguNaM niShkalaM sUkShmaM nirvikalpaM nira~njanam . ekamevAdvayaM brahma neha nAnAsti ki~nchana

matram.text: vINAyA rUpasaundaryaM tantrIvAdanasauShThavam . prajAra~njanamAtraM tanna sAmrAjyAya kalpate
sad.hbrahmakAryaM sakalaM sadevaM tanmAtrametanna tato.anyadasti . sanmAtrametanna astIti yo vakti na tasya moho vinirgato nidritavatprajalpaH
brahmaivedaM vishvamityeva vANI shrautI brUte.atharvaniShThA variShThA . tasmAdetad.hbrahmamAtraM hi vishvaM nAdhiShThAnAd.hbhinnatA.a.aropitasya
bhrAntasya yadyad.hbhramataH pratItaM brahmaiva tattadrajataM hi shuktiH . idantayA brahma sadaiva rUpyate tvAropitaM brahmaNi nAmamAtram
j~nAtR^ij~neyaj~nAnashUnyamanantaM nirvikalpakam . kevalAkhaNDachinmAtraM paraM tattvaM vidurbudhAH
asthUlamityetadasannirasya sid.hdhaM svato vyomavadapratarkyam . ato mR^iShAmAtramidaM pratItaM jahIhi yatsvAtmatayA gR^ihItam . brahmAhamityeva vishud.hdhabud.hdhyA vid.hdhi svamAtmAnamakhaNDabodham

mR^itkAryaM sakalaM ghaTAdi satataM mR^inmAtramevAhitaM tadvatsajjanitaM sadAtmakamidaM sanmAtramevAkhilam . yasmAnnAsti sataH paraM kimapi tatsatyaM sa AtmA svayaM tasmAttattvamasi prashAntamamalaM brahmAdvayaM yatparam
yatra bhrAntyA kalpitaM tadviveke tattanmAtraM naiva tasmAdvibhinnam . svapne naShTaM svapnavishvaM vichitraM svasmAdbhinnaM kinnu dR^iShTaM prabodhe
sambodhamAtraM parishud.hdhatattvaM vij~nAya sa~Nghe nR^ipavachcha sainye . tadAshrayaH svAtmani sarvadA sthito vilApaya brahmaNi vishvajAtam .. 265.. dR^ishyajAtam
dR^ishyaM pratItaM pravilApayansan.h sanmAtramAnandaghanaM vibhAvayan . samAhitaH sanbahirantaraM vA kAlaM nayethAH sati karmabandhe

ghaTaM jalaM tad.hgatamarkabimbaM vihAya sarvaM vinirIkShyate.arkaH . divi vIkShyate.arkaH taTastha etattritayAvabhAsakaH svayamprakAsho viduShA yathA tathA
shrutyA yuktyA svAnubhUtyA j~nAtvA sArvAtmyamAtmanaH . kvachidAbhAsataH prAptasvAdhyAsApanayaM kuru
ChAyeva puMsaH paridR^ishyamAna\- mAbhAsarUpeNa phalAnubhUtyA . sharIramArAchChavavannirastaM punarna sandhatta idaM mahAtmA
nAhamidaM nAhamado.apyubhayoravabhAsakaM paraM shud.hdham . bAhyAbhyantarashUnyaM pUrNaM brahmAdvitIyamevAham
avyaktAdisthUlaparyantametat.h vishvaM yatrAbhAsamAtraM pratItam . vyomaprakhyaM sUkShmamAdyantahInaM brahmAdvaitaM yattadevAhamasmi

na hi prabud.hdhaH pratibhAsadehe dehopayoginyapi cha prapa~nche . karotyahantAM mamatAmidantAM kintu svayaM tiShThati jAgareNa

tejas.text: atraiva sattvAtmani dhIguhAyAM avyAkR^itAkAsha ushatprakAshaH . uruprakAshaH AkAsha uchchai ravivatprakAshate svatejasA vishvamidaM prakAshayan
tejasIva tamo yatra pralInaM bhrAntikAraNam . yatra vilInaM advitIye pare tattve nirvisheShe bhidA kutaH
bhAnuneva jagatsarvaM bhAsate yasya tejasA . anAtmakamasattuchChaM kiM nu tasyAvabhAsakam
vilakShaNaM yathA dhvAntaM lIyate bhAnutejasi . tathaiva sakalaM dR^ishyaM brahmaNi pravilIyate

ayanam.text: viShayANAmAnukUlye sukhI duHkhI viparyaye . sukhaM duHkhaM cha tad.hdharmaH sadAnandasya nAtmanaH
tAbhyAM pravardhamAnA sA sUte sa.nsR^itimAtmanaH . trayANAM cha kShayopAyaH sarvAvasthAsu sarvadA
tvamahamidamitIyaM kalpanA bud.hdhidoShAt.h prabhavati paramAtmanyadvaye nirvisheShe . pravilasati samAdhAvasya sarvo vikalpo vilayanamupagachChedvastutattvAvadhR^ityA

arthat.text: AtmArthatvena hi preyAnviShayo na svataH priyaH . svata eva hi sarveShAmAtmA priyatamo yataH . tata AtmA sadAnando nAsya duHkhaM kadAchana
sadidaM paramAdvaitaM svasmAdanyasya vastuno.abhAvAt . na hyanyadasti ki~nchit samyak paramArthatattvabodhadashAyAm .. 226.. paratattvabodhasudashAyAm
tatastu tau lakShaNayA sulakShyau tayorakhaNDaikarasatvasid.hdhaye . nAlaM jahatyA na tathA.ajahatyA kintUbhayArthAtmikayaiva bhAvyam .. 247.. bhayArthaikatayaiva
samyagvivekaH sphuTabodhajanyo vibhajya dR^igdR^ishyapadArthatattvam . Chinatti mAyAkR^itamohabandhaM yasmAdvimuktastu punarna sa.nsR^itiH .. 345.. vimuktasya
mAyAmAtramidaM dvaitamadvaitaM paramArthataH . iti brUte shrutiH sAkShAtsuShuptAvanubhUyate
na nirodho na chotpattirna bad.hdho na cha sAdhakaH . na mumukShurna vai mukta ityeShA paramArthatA

bandho mokShashcha tR^iptishcha chintA.a.arogyakShudhAdayaH . svenaiva vedyA yajj~nAnaM pareShAmAnumAnikam

supta.text: yatsuShuptau nirviShaya AtmAnando.anubhUyate . shrutiH pratyakShamaitihyamanumAnaM cha jAgrati
yadi satyaM bhavedvishvaM suShuptAvupalabhyatAm . yannopalabhyate ki~nchidato.asatsvapnavanmR^iShA
ahampadArthastvahamAdisAkShI nityaM suShuptAvapi bhAvadarshanAt . brUte hyajo nitya iti shrutiH svayaM tatpratyagAtmA sadasadvilakShaNaH
dehAdisa.nsaktimato na muktiH muktasya dehAdyabhimatyabhAvaH . suptasya no jAgaraNaM na jAgrataH svapnastayorbhinnaguNAshrayatvAt
ekAtmake pare tattve bhedavArtA kathaM vaset . kathaM bhavet suShuptau sukhamAtrAyAM bhedaH kenAvalokitaH
mAyAmAtramidaM dvaitamadvaitaM paramArthataH . iti brUte shrutiH sAkShAtsuShuptAvanubhUyate
na me dehena sambandho megheneva vihAyasaH . ataH kuto me tad.hdharmA jAgratsvapnasuShuptayaH

mR^itkAryabhUto.api mR^ido na bhinnaH kumbho.asti sarvatra tu mR^itsvarUpAt . na kumbharUpaM pR^ithagasti kumbhaH kuto mR^iShA kalpitanAmamAtraH
kenApi mR^id.hbhinnatayA svarUpaM ghaTasya sandarshayituM na shakyate . ato ghaTaH kalpita eva mohA\- nmR^ideva satyaM paramArthabhUtam
brahmaivedaM vishvamityeva vANI shrautI brUte.atharvaniShThA variShThA . tasmAdetad.hbrahmamAtraM hi vishvaM nAdhiShThAnAd.hbhinnatA.a.aropitasya
yatra bhrAntyA kalpitaM tadviveke tattanmAtraM naiva tasmAdvibhinnam . svapne naShTaM svapnavishvaM vichitraM svasmAdbhinnaM kinnu dR^iShTaM prabodhe

sa devadatto.ayamitIha chaikatA virud.hdhadharmA.nshamapAsya kathyate . yathA tathA tattvamasItivAkye virud.hdhadharmAnubhayatra hitvA

prasiddha.text: shud.hdhAdvayabrahmavibodhanAshyA sarpabhramo rajjuvivekato yathA . rajastamaHsattvamiti prasid.hdhA guNAstadIyAH prathitaiH svakAryaiH
prakR^itivikR^itishUnyaM bhAvanAtItabhAvaM samarasamasamAnaM mAnasambandhadUram . nigamavachanasid.hdhaM nityamasmatprasid.hdhaM hR^idi kalayati vidvAn brahma pUrNaM samAdhau

sattvam.text: shud.hdhAdvayabrahmavibodhanAshyA sarpabhramo rajjuvivekato yathA . rajastamaHsattvamiti prasid.hdhA guNAstadIyAH prathitaiH svakAryaiH
sattvaM vishud.hdhaM jalavattathApi tAbhyAM militvA saraNAya kalpate . yatrAtmabimbaH pratibimbitaH san.h prakAshayatyarka ivAkhilaM jaDam
tamo dvAbhyAM rajaH sattvAtsattvaM shud.hdhena nashyati . tasmAtsattvamavaShTabhya svAdhyAsApanayaM kuru
vikAriNAM sarvavikAravettA nityAvikAro bhavituM samarhati . nityo.avikAro manorathasvapnasuShuptiShu sphuTaM punaH punardR^iShTamasattvametayoH
tato vikArAH prakR^iterahammukhA dehAvasAnA viShayAshcha sarve . kShaNe.anyathAbhAvitayA hyamIShA\- masattvamAtmA tu kadApi nAnyathA .. 350.. masattvamAtmA tu kadApi
sharIrasyApi prArabdhakalpanA bhrAntireva hi . adhyastasya kutaH sattvamasatyasya kuto janiH . sattvamasattvasya ajAtasya kuto nAshaH prArabdhamasataH kutaH

advaya.text: shud.hdhAdvayabrahmavibodhanAshyA sarpabhramo rajjuvivekato yathA . rajastamaHsattvamiti prasid.hdhA guNAstadIyAH prathitaiH svakAryaiH

kenApi mR^id.hbhinnatayA svarUpaM ghaTasya sandarshayituM na shakyate . ato ghaTaH kalpita eva mohA\- nmR^ideva satyaM paramArthabhUtam
mAtApitrormalod.hbhUtaM malamAMsamayaM vapuH . tyaktvA chANDAlavad.hdUraM brahmIbhUya kR^itI bhava
yatsatyabhUtaM nijarUpamAdyaM chidadvayAnandamarUpamakriyam . tadetya mithyAvapurutsR^ijeta shailUShavadveShamupAttamAtmanaH
satatavimalabodhAnandarUpaM sametya tyaja jaDamalarUpopAdhimetaM sudUre . atha punarapi naiSha smaryatAM vAntavastu smaraNaviShayabhUtaM kalpate kutsanAya
kva gataM kena vA nItaM kutra lInamidaM jagat . adhunaiva mayA dR^iShTaM nAsti kiM mahadadbhutam
chalatyupAdhau pratibimbalaulya\- maupAdhikaM mUDhadhiyo nayanti . svabimbabhUtaM ravivadviniShkriyaM kartAsmi bhoktAsmi hato.asmi heti

nirvikalpe.text: atrAtmabud.hdhiM tyaja mUDhabud.hdhe tva~N.hmA.nsamedo.asthipurISharAshau . sarvAtmani brahmaNi nirvikalpe kuruShva shAntiM paramAM bhajasva
vAchaM niyachChAtmani taM niyachCha bud.hdhau dhiyaM yachCha cha bud.hdhisAkShiNi . taM chApi pUrNAtmani nirvikalpe vilApya shAntiM paramAM bhajasva
samAhitAyAM sati chittavR^ittau parAtmani brahmaNi nirvikalpe . na dR^ishyate kashchidayaM vikalpaH prajalpamAtraH parishiShyate yataH .. 398.. tataH
na hyasti vishvaM paratattvabodhAt.h sadAtmani brahmaNi nirvikalpe . kAlatraye nApyahirIkShito guNe na hyambubindurmR^igatR^iShNikAyAm
samUlametatparidAhya vahnau sadAtmani brahmaNi nirvikalpe . tataH svayaM nityavishud.hdhabodhA\- nandAtmanA tiShThati vidvariShThaH
sthulAdibhAvA mayi kalpitA bhramA\- dAropitAnusphuraNena lokaiH . kAle yathA kalpakavatsarAya\- NartvAdayo niShkalanirvikalpe
akhaNDabodhAtmani nirvikalpe vikalpanaM vyomni puraprakalpanam . tadadvayAnandamayAtmanA sadA shAntiM parAmetya bhajasva maunam

punar.text: dehAtmadhIreva nR^iNAmasad.hdhiyAM janmAdiduHkhaprabhavasya bIjam . yatastatastvaM jahi tAM prayatnAt.h tyakte tu chitte na punarbhavAshA
bud.hdhau guhAyAM sadasadvilakShaNaM brahmAsti satyaM paramadvitIyam . tadAtmanA yo.atra vased.hguhAyAM punarna tasyA~NgaguhApraveshaH
vikAriNAM sarvavikAravettA nityAvikAro bhavituM samarhati . nityo.avikAro manorathasvapnasuShuptiShu sphuTaM punaH punardR^iShTamasattvametayoH
tataH svarUpavibhra.nsho vibhraShTastu patatyadhaH . patitasya vinA nAshaM punarnAroha IkShyate
samyagvivekaH sphuTabodhajanyo vibhajya dR^igdR^ishyapadArthatattvam . Chinatti mAyAkR^itamohabandhaM yasmAdvimuktastu punarna sa.nsR^itiH .. 345.. vimuktasya
ChAyeva puMsaH paridR^ishyamAna\- mAbhAsarUpeNa phalAnubhUtyA . sharIramArAchChavavannirastaM punarna sandhatta idaM mahAtmA
satatavimalabodhAnandarUpaM sametya tyaja jaDamalarUpopAdhimetaM sudUre . atha punarapi naiSha smaryatAM vAntavastu smaraNaviShayabhUtaM kalpate kutsanAya
samAdhinA sAdhuvinishchalAtmanA pashyAtmatattvaM sphuTabodhachakShuShA . niHsa.nshayaM samyagavekShitashche\- chChrutaH padArtho na punarvikalpyate .. 473.. punarvikalpate
svArAjyasAmrAjyavibhUtireShA bhavatkR^ipAshrImahimaprasAdAt . prAptA mayA shrIgurave mahAtmane namo namaste.astu punarnamo.astu
iti natamavalokya shiShyavaryaM samadhigatAtmasukhaM prabud.hdhatattvam . pramuditahR^idayaM sa deshikendraH punaridamAha vachaH paraM mahAtmA

kimapi satatabodhaM kevalAnandarUpaM nirupamamativelaM nityamuktaM nirIham . niravadhigaganAbhaM niShkalaM nirvikalpaM hR^idi kalayati vidvAn brahma pUrNaM samAdhau
yadyuttarottarAbhAvaH pUrvapUrvantu niShphalam . nivR^ittiH paramA tR^iptirAnando.anupamaH svataH
bhavAnapIdaM paratattvamAtmanaH svarUpamAnandaghanaM vichArya . nichAyya vidhUya mohaM svamanaHprakalpitaM muktaH kR^itArtho bhavatu prabud.hdhaH
nirupamamanAditattvaM tvamahamidamada iti kalpanAdUram . nityAnandaikarasaM satyaM brahmAdvitIyamevAham

adhyasa.text: adhyAsadoShAtpuruShasya sa.nsR^itiH adhyAsabandhastvamunaiva kalpitaH . rajastamodoShavato.avivekino janmAdiduHkhasya nidAnametat
lokAnuvartanaM tyaktvA tyaktvA dehAnuvartanam . shAstrAnuvartanaM tyaktvA svAdhyAsApanayaM kuru
svAtmanyeva sadA sthitvA mano nashyati yoginaH . sthityA vAsanAnAM kShayashchAtaH svAdhyAsApanayaM kuru
tamo dvAbhyAM rajaH sattvAtsattvaM shud.hdhena nashyati . tasmAtsattvamavaShTabhya svAdhyAsApanayaM kuru
prArabdhaM puShyati vapuriti nishchitya nishchalaH . dhairyamAlambya yatnena svAdhyAsApanayaM kuru
nAhaM jIvaH paraM brahmetyatad.hvyAvR^ittipUrvakam . vAsanAvegataH prAptasvAdhyAsApanayaM kuru
shrutyA yuktyA svAnubhUtyA j~nAtvA sArvAtmyamAtmanaH . kvachidAbhAsataH prAptasvAdhyAsApanayaM kuru
anAdAnavisargAbhyAmIShannAsti kriyA muneH . annAdAnavisargA tadekaniShThayA nityaM svAdhyAsApanayaM kuru
ahambhAvasya dehe.asminniHsheShavilayAvadhi . sAvadhAnena yuktAtmA svAdhyAsApanayaM kuru
